description:
Shadows gather and danger prowls the land, as new Threats emerge to terrorize the realms. From sinister creatures that haunt the silent forests to dark forces that stalk the bustling cities. Even the remote hideaways and the traveling caravans are not spared from their wrath.

The Hunted Expansion adds additional scoring through the Threat system as well as the ability to play Effortless cooperatively!
  At the end of each round, a threat will emerge and all players will simultaneously fight the emerging Threat. Players will earn Greatness if they are able to defeat the threat. If they go it alone, they will score even more Greatness! The new Grit Cards help with the defeat of any threat and represent a combination of bravery and expertise in dealing with Threats.

In this time of peril, unity becomes your greatest strength. Will you band together to overcome the darkness?

—description from the publisher

Magic courses through the land, altering all it touches. From Orcs on rugged peaks to Dwarves in ancient caverns. Elves beneath the canopy of age-old forests and Gnomes nestled within verdant hills. This power bestows extraordinary abilities, deep knowledge, and unparalleled skills.

The Altered Expansion introduces asymmetry to the game, providing players with unique abilities and starting attributes. Will you be an Orc Cleric or a Fairy Barbarian?

At the start of the game, each player will be dealt a Race as well as 2 Classes to choose from. Races provide players with modifiers for their attributes while Classes provide you with a unique ability.

What will you do with these gifts?

—description from the publisher

It is the year 2358, and a massive spaceship is locked into orbit around the newly discovered world Darwin IV. With the help of the Yma, our alien patrons, humanity has finally achieved one of its cherished goals – to reach a distant exoplanet. Descending to the surface in sealed hovercones, a multitude of scientists and researchers, both human and otherworldly, will spread across this virginal world to study the diverse and often bizarre fauna found in all of its varied biomes. From vast savannahs and scattered pocket forests to the frozen tundra and the mystifying Amoebic Sea, explorers will rise to the challenges of a world teeming with biological wonders. It is here on Darwin IV that the human race will begin to fulfill its age-old yearning to explore the universe and understand the intricacies of an alien planet.

Based on Wayne Barlowe's beautifully illustrated book "Expedition", in Expedition To Darwin IV players take on the role of human scientists in the year 2358 AD, exploring the alien world Darwin IV in search of new life. Piloting their hovercones across different biomes, scientists will locate and study the unique indigenous species of Darwin IV in an effort to learn more about the planet's strange and wondrous inhabitants. With the data they've collected, each scientist will share their work with their benign custodians, the Yma, earning them reputation.

But Darwin IV isn't without its dangers as scientists must also be cautious with the planet's more aggressive predators, navigate its unpredictable weather patterns, and avoid other deadly off-world threats...

—description from the publisher

This is a set of minimalistic rules - brief enough to fit on a ruler, whence the name - for refighting the Alamo, aimed at convention play. It is an updated version of a 1980s original.

The Mexicans try and seize the place while minimizing their losses; the Texians try to sell themselves dearly enough to turn the Mexicans' inevitable victory into a Pyrrhic one.

—user summary

boardgame: On Air: Play Like a Deejay
description:
Party game. Play like a dee jay
The game focuses on the art of improvisation and bluffing, adding an intriguing and competitive element.
He tackles the exciting task of breaking news stories and introducing songs with skill. To be successful, it is essential to demonstrate considerable skill and dexterity, as the deception can be exposed by opponents.
Only one of the players knows in advance what this information will be and has the opportunity to make a premeditated choice. The others will have to improvise a connection only after choosing their song, when the "director" on duty will read the news or message to everyone.Once everyone has demonstrated their best improvisation skills, we will vote simultaneously on who we think actually already knew the news before choosing the song. getting points if you guess correctly or are designated as the best improviser.

Table Curling is a fast-paced P&P game where you'll need to score victory points with the dexterity of your fingers.

The game lasts for 3 rounds, with the following actions:

     With your finger, push the pencil towards the zone with victory points. Control your power so that the pencil stops in one of the zones with victory points and doesn’t go out the field.
     If the pencil stopped in one of the zones with victory points, use this pencil to write down the number of points in the cell of the corresponding round (I, II, or III). If the pencil stops before or after the victory point zones, write 0 points in the appropriate cell.
     Put the pencil on the "Start" zone and pass the turn to the next player on the left.


After all players have made their turn in the last, third round, count each player's total points for the 3 rounds.

—description from the designer

A garden war is on the rise and your are ready to take over the entire neighbourhood and proof yourself worthy as the Best gardener in Gardenville!

Surrounded by mad gardeners, you are determined to win the race and be the first to earn 250 gold by planting seeds, harvesting crops and selling them for the highest price at the Marketplace. Along your way you will discover that your neighbours carry a heavy bag of unpleasant tricks that can either ruin your harvest or boost their own garden - so put on your mad gardener and dive into a hectic garden brawl!

Mad Gardeners is a light strategic game that combines elements of farming with deck and engine building.

—description from the publisher

Welcome to Deth Wizards, a miniatures-agnostic tabletop wargame where you and your friends take the role of powerful Necromancers, commanding your undead minions against the villages and heroes of the land of Deth. Designed to play solo, co-op, or as an adversarial skirmish game.

Build your rampaging horde of undead minions from any models you like. Skeletons, zombies, ghouls, ghosts, vampires, and more are yours to control. There are 19 different undead to raise, recruit, and create with unique capabilities. You can even create new undead from the heroes you destroy. Choose your minions and lead them to battle in Deth Wizards!

What kind of Necromancer are you? From Dread Horde Masters and their legions of simple undead to armor-clad War Reapers fighting shoulder to shoulder with their minions - you decide how you want to play. There are six different legacies to choose from in Deth Wizards, as well as more than 30 Necromantic Powers and 21 special abilities to make your necromancer unique.

Play through 11 different missions - rob graveyards, assault arcane colleges, kill the king, or attempt your own dark apotheosis. In Story Play, you decide your evil schemes, though beware - the Heroes of Deth will not take your assaults lightly. In Skirmish play, you will square off against other necromancers to see who is the true master of the dark arts.

Going it alone, they keep their head down and options open.

A basic difficulty variant setup and gameplay card for Rumors of Gold, where you must use all 3 dice on your turn.

Escape Master is a fast-paced real-time speed card game that blends elements from classic speed card games like Dutch Blitz and modern games with a theme and storyline. The game experience was designed for maximal fun, screams, and fierce competition.

Escape Master is set in the Vapor Isles where each player takes on the role of an Escape Leader. Each Escape Leader competes to set the most captives free from the clutches of the Doom Master while committing the fewest blunders. Too many blunders and the Doom Master discovers and destroys the only way of escape ending the game.

The basic mechanic is simple. Players play numbered cards in ascending or descending order on stacks as fast as possible in order to be the first player to play every card in their hand. Any cards left in a player's hand at the end of a round count as blunders against them. The player with the fewest blunders when the blunder breaking point is reached wins. Special cards such as traps and dead ends add a twist to the game making it more difficult for players to escape. Various card combinations and asymmetric Escape Leader abilities also add an additional level of complexity and fun to the game.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet – Twilight Masquerade
description:
Venture into Kitakami, a place where people and Pokémon live harmoniously with nature. Folktales from the land tell of a mysterious masked Pokémon named Ogerpon.

The Pokémon Scarlet and Pokémon Violet video game adventure continued in the land of Kitakami in The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero Part 1: The Teal Mask, and now you can discover new Pokémon from that area in the Pokémon TCG! Okidogi, Munkidori, and Fezandipiti—the Heroes of Kitakami—have “Adrena” Abilities that harness the power of Darkness-type Energy to unleash unique skills. You can also use Bloodmoon Ursaluna ex’s Seasoned Skill Ability to quickly turn the tables on an opponent who has taken multiple Prize cards.
-Description from the publisher

boardgame: Japanime Tactics: Granblue Fantasy – Volume 1 Expansion
description:
Japanime Tactics: Granblue Fantasy – Volume 1 Expansion contains the acrylic standee and stat card for a random character, as well as six associated action cards.

This character can be used in a game of Japanime Tactics: Granblue Fantasy or in any Japanime Tactics title.

boardgame: The Very Hungry Caterpillar Rainbow Picnic
description:
Briarpatch's The Very Hungry Caterpillar Rainbow Picnic Game game helps young children practice color recognition, patience, gross-motor skills and vocabulary.

Draw a card and choose a colorful food item from the picnic that matches. Be the first to fill your rainbow with 6 different colored foods and win the game!

A perfect game for screen-free fun and preschool children Ages 3+. Creativity and curiosity are two key building blocks for a lifetime of learning, this game is designed not only to amuse and delight but to inspire fun, playful discovery.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description: A card game with 390 questions about National Parks in the U.S.A. Includes 200 question cards, and five 10-second challenge cards. Most cards have an easy and a hard level to choose from. Question categories include Plants, Animals & Water; Geology & Astronomy; Tourism; and Cultural History. Instructions include standard rules for individual or team play plus a shorter "Weekend Getaway" mode and pub trivia rules.

Bob Kehl is one of the foremost modern pirate artists, and now 8 of his most memorable captains have been beautifully sculpted to become Sea of Legends captains! These new captains use the same abilities as the captains from the base game and Rise of the Ancients expansion, finally allowing more than one player to use each ability in a game. This add-on includes 8 incredible captains and everything you need to play them in a game of Sea of Legends.

Fugitives is a story driven, co-operative adventure board game with thrilling story through the beautiful mid-century southern landscape.

In the story, players find themselves on the run but don't know why. The escape turns into an investigation, when you realize the only way out is to confront your enemies.

On your journey your choices matter and you’ll either be the hero or become the villain.

—description from the publisher

Take on the role of 1 of 4 Mad Scientists and create your Monster Champion by smashing together 2 out of 24 fantastical creatures.

Mint-Tin Monster Mash-Up combines dice, tactics, timing, and deceit into a portable dueling game that’s easy to learn and plays in 15 minutes!

Each Monster Card in the game has a Monster front on one side and a Monster back on the other.  Players will assemble a unique creature by combining a front and back.  The combination will not only determine its battle stats, but also create a unique "if-then" power that can be triggered to sway the tide of battle.

Players will roll dice to determine their Attack.  Energy and special powers can be used to manipulate the results.

Once the dice are locked in, players simultaneously reveal a hand signal.  They can add 0-5 Attack by "Boosting" (spending Energy), or they can Defend to reduce their Damage and regain Energy equal to their intelligence, or they can hit the "Panic Button" and force both players to re-roll.  BUT, if a player Defends against a Panic Button, they auto-kill their opponent's creature.

The loser of the battle takes damage equal to the Arena level plus any special attack damage.  The Arena gets increasingly deadly until a battle is resolved.  When a Monster is killed, the player's Mad Scientist flips over to their more powerful form, giving them an advantage in the next Battle.

The first player to kill 3 of their opponent's Monsters wins.

—description from the publisher

Night of the Nomstrosities is a Co-Op mini expansion for Sugarpow: Dice Battle Royale. Draft your candy fighters from the main game and work together to defeat the big boss bad guys, the Nomstrosities!

—description from the publisher

Cruella de Vil and her infamous henchmen, Horace and Jasper, have kidnapped all the dalmatians in London! To make the search for the adorable puppies even more difficult, Cruella decided to hide them in various locations across the city's neighborhoods. Kicking off the rescue mission, a team of fearless investigators has been assembled, and each volunteer must search two neighborhoods in the city. The one who finds all 101 Dalmatians will be the great hero of this story!

In 101 Dalmatians, you control two groups of 5 cards called neighborhoods. The neighborhoods are positioned on the table between the players, so each player has one neighborhood to their left and another to their right. On your turn, you decide whether to replace one of the cards in one of the neighborhoods beside you, perform the action of one of the cards in your hand, or discard a card. Throughout the game, the cards in the neighborhoods will be revealed or replaced, so that at some point, all the cards in a neighborhood are revealed. The game ends at the end of the turn in which all the cards in both neighborhoods controlled by a player are revealed. All still hidden cards are revealed, and the values of each neighborhood are summed. Your goal is to sum up 101 dalmatians with all 10 cards from the two neighborhoods beside you. If no one sums 101 Dalmatians, the winner will be the one who sums the most puppies without exceeding the total of 101.

—description from the designer

After a day's work in the mine, nothing is more fair for the seven dwarfs than a lively party with their friend Snow White. However, there's a small problem: each participant has a different musical taste! Debating between lively or soft melodies, they can't agree on the ideal songs for the party. Your mission is to help these adorable characters compose the perfect songs for their celebration!

Snow White is a cooperative game where players must compose the party's songs at the seven dwarfs' house. On your turn, each player must choose an Instrument Card from their hand and play it in the area below any of the Characters in play. Each Character's music has a Melody rule that must be respected for an Instrument Card to be in it. To win, it's necessary to complete the songs of all Characters.

—description from the designer
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Snow White

description:
In the Lands of the Kingdom, the legacy of the Lion King is threatened by Scar's betrayal and his alliance with the hyenas. Simba, Nala, Timon, and Pumbaa must gather their friends to restore peace. The bonds of friendship and the courage to face dangers are the key to gathering the necessary forces. The fate of the Kingdom Lands lies in the paws of these unlikely heroes as they confront the shadow of betrayal and fight to preserve the eternal cycle of life.

In Ludoteca Disney - Rei Leão, on your turn you must play a card from your hand to capture a card from the table. You must form with the captured cards a collection of allies and opponents to score at the end of the game. The player who scores the most points with their collection will save the Kingdom Lands and be the winner.

—description from the designer

Captivate is a fast-paced tabletop card game of strategy, skill, and memory for 2-4 players.

Flip over cards and capture them to score points, but watch out - your opponents have plans of their own!

Captivate is quick to learn, even for a large group, but difficult to master. There are many features to keep you and your friends playing over and over again.

Who will come out on top?

Combine multiple decks for exciting team battles, and to increase the number of players to 5+

—description from the designer

Crash through enemy gates in chariots of chrome!

This high-octane expansion introduces 32 new camps that bring devastating combos, clutch play, and endless replayability for the aspiring Radlands diesel-head.

This pack also features 10 rebalanced replacement camps to shift your existing copy of Radlands into high gear.

—description from the publisher

description: Players take turn rolling one of their 9 rune stones (dice) and placing it on the board. Grouping runes with the same number multiplies their value for a greater score. But be careful, if an opponent places a rune with the same value in their connected column, your runes are Burk'ed and must be removed from the board and returned to your pool of rune stones. The round ends once any player places all 9 of their rune stones on the board. The player with the highest score wins the round.

In Dessert Wars, the stakes are high as you battle for sweet supremacy! Your mission: collect the most glowing reviews for your dessert store before the big award ceremony. But watch out, your competitors are aiming for the same glory. Sabotage their efforts with scathing negative reviews and amplify the damage using powerful marketing cards.

Each player runs their own dessert store, taking one action and drawing one card per turn. The game ends when the deck is exhausted or a player gathers three sets of stellar reviews. (A set is four cards).

Fight fiercely, strategize cunningly, and ensure your dessert store reigns supreme in Dessert Wars!

—description from the designer

Create a large fantasy map by combining four regional maps made using the Fantasy Map Maker system.

Highlights include:

     Main Quests to pursue across all four maps
     the continuation of features from one map to the next 
     a new Landmark: the Port, which allows possible corrections and improvements to a previously completed game sheet
     a modified Feature Wheel 


—description from the designer

boardgame: Черепашки-ниндзя: Цитадель Шреддера (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder's Citadel)
family: Comic Books: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

boardgame: TTMC: Tu te mets combien? – Musique
description:
The goal of the game is to be the first to travel the board by answering the questions asked.

The originality lies on the principle of self-assessment of your knowledge from 1 to 10 on a multitude of subjects. Simple things!

A question corresponds to each note, with varying difficulty.
In case of a good answer the team will advance by the number of squares corresponding to its self-assessed score.
In case of wrong answer, the team will remain on the same square until the next turn.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Collect as many treats as possible, respecting the mixtures requested!

You have to collect the cards one by one, following 
the instructions.
There are 8 different objects on the front side; and on  the back side, a green zone and a red zone. Players must find cards on which the objects in the «green» zone appear AND where the objects in the «red» zone are absent.  
A game of observation and speed.

Guide salmon or eels across the river and lure the hungry Bear into your rival's territory to win the game.
Turn after turn, engage your fish in the river by cleverly placing them on the tiles, the effect of which will make the bear advance towards the opposing territory. Be patient and skillful to place your fish in the best locations.

Discover the plans of your adversaries to raise the biggest loot!

Off the coast of an archipelago of three islands, legend tells that a royal ship was shipwrecked. Your crew of pirates are out to collect the most precious treasures, brought in turn after turn by the tide. You're not alone in this area, and you'll need intuition and perspicacity to foil your opponents' traps.

Players take on the role of a pirate and are provided with cards representing a pirate ship or an explorer ship. Players face three islands on which treasures accumulate.
The pirates play simultaneously. At each turn of the game: 
Each player secretly chooses the island they will approach, either on an expedition to recover the treasure, or on an attack to plunder the enemy boat.
Then the players reveal their card and apply the actions defined in the rule, winning or not the loot present on the Island.
The one who brings back the most treasures at the end of the game wins.

Neither maps nor names exist for this place. They tried to revive technology, but failed. Their harmony, today, is the measure of that failure. Everything dies, and dies anew, in a loop infected by the germ of iteration. Creatures are born, whose only purpose being to be crushed, torn, mangled.
Endlessly. Again and again.
With neither end nor beginning.

In this dungeon crawler with roguelike elements, players will navigate through the Stomach Prison maze trying to find two sirens which, once activated, will open the gate for the freedom. Each turn the players will reveal a maze tile and face what it hides which may be loot (draw from a deck), mutations (draw from another deck), monsters (up to five per tile, spawned through the roll of a die and then draw from a dedicated deck of cards), sirens or events. In the last two cases players will be instructed to read a dedicated paragraph on an event booklet and, sometimes, will be give choices to take tests to attempt. On the other hand, ringing sirens will summon a sub-boss players will have to defeat.
The combat system is based on the "D8-entropy system", in which every attack (both from players and from enemies) is resolved by a modified d8 roll with 8 representing a critical hit and 1 always a miss (modifiers applied due to player and weapons characteristics, mutations or altered status): if the modified result is 8 or more the attack is successful and damage is dealt.
But be careful. Even defeating the last boss won't be enough to grant your freedom, since only one player will be able to escape...
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

boardgame: World Wonders: Cristo Redentor Promo Pack
description:
Promo pack includes:

- Cristo Redentor wookden token.
- 2 promo cards of the Monument of Christ the Redeemer available during World Wonders: Europa pre-sale
- 5 metals coins

The Cristo is a transient piece that is available to all players from the beginning of the game and is worth 3 points to whoever possesses it at the end of the game.

After building 3 Monuments, any player can claim and build the Cristo for free if the requirements are met.

If any other player has more builds than the current player with the Cristo, and meets all the requirements, they can steal the Cristo from the current player.

GRIMLORE Profane Truths is an episodical print-and-play word-finding and dice-manipulation game with role-playing aspects. In every episode (or case file), you try to fill several scenarios with letters to form dictionary words to progress in the story and to defeat your opponents. As you progress, the character that you represent gains more knowledge and equipment to help them in their case.

As a Noble, you have always been trying to win the favor of the Royal Family. Well now is your chance! Build influence with all four Families, as you seek to climb the ladder and join the Royal Court. Be careful though, events with the Families also have assassins, deal makers, and spies in attendance, all of which will manipulate the way influence is gained. Will you court enough of the Royals to win their favor, or will you be forgotten?

In this 2-4 player card game that is played with a regular deck of cards, you will be drafting cards from a central area, trying to gain more influence than other players. Collect sets of cards in the same suit to improve your chances, but don't forget about the other suits, as you can only win if you have more than one family's support. So grab a deck of cards, and print out our free rulebook. Joining the Royal Family is only a shuffle away.

—description from the designer

Open The Royal Deluxe Treasure box, and behold the wonder of Nidavellir coins! Featuring a bevelled opening, a thermoformed display case to hold the coins, and closed by a transparent plastic lid, this treasure box is majestic!

The display neatly organizes the uniquely designed Royal Treasure pieces, providing dedicated compartments for the 5 Elvalands starting pieces, and a designated area for discarding pieces during gameplay. The Royal Deluxe Treasure box measures at: 9.5"x8.5"x4".

Additionally, a game variant with an asymmetrical start is included: this means that at the start of the game, you'll get different coins from the other Elvalands, according to the gem drawn at random. This will result in a modification of the Royal Treasure with the addition of an 18, 23 and 25 coin (also included in this Deluxe Royal Treasure).

The Royal Deluxe Treasure contains 69 specially designed poker chips, 40 mm in diameter and 3.3 mm thick, with a weight of 13.5 gr.

Players take on the role of a fantasy chef from the Kingdom of Culnaria. Each round, they must combine their current hand of bizarre ingredients into a dish that they feel will meet The Judge's exact specifications. Using dry-erase markers, players can predict each dish's flavor strength, note secret ingredients, and name their newest concoction. Only the best meals will win The Judge's favor and earn the champion a Victory Star rating.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Thanksgiving: John Carver's Carving Board Game
description:
In this game based on Eli Roth's hit film, players start by attending an in-store Black Friday sale that gets way out of hand, with people dying in horrific ways in every aisle! But things go from bad to worse because a killer wearing a John Carver mask is also on the loose murdering the townsfolk in droves!

Unlike the movie, you are rewarded for dying - A LOT! The player who dies the most is revealed to be John Carver, triggering a final battle between the rest of the players and Carver!

Trading card game based on the upcoming Spirit Tamer web game. Train up your Spirits so they learn new abilities, and take out the opposing Tamer (player).

Players start with Basic Spirits and train (upgrade) them for battle! Use Invoke and Sprite cards to teach them new attacks and abilities, support them with Action and Item cards.

Attack the opposing Tamer while defending yourself from the opponent's attacks. The first Tamer to get their opponent's life to zero wins!

—description from the designer

boardgame: A Cure For What Ails You
description:
Choose one of four asymmetric roles (Voodoo Mambo, Hoodoo Root Doctor, Pharmacist, or Charlatan) and work to treat patients made ill by The Haze. Collect the cards the patients need, then roll to see if they survive the treatment. If they do, gain the rewards shown which can be used for role abilities (better healing chances, increased rewards, substitutions, etc.) or converted to Victory Points at the end of the game.

If the players outlast The Haze by curing enough patients, they then compare scores to see who was the best healer; if too many patients die, the game ends early and everyone loses.

—description from the designer

Players will step into the quiet town of Whispering Pines to solve the cold case of Christine Black's murder. There are over 50 pieces of evidence, including police records, newspaper clippings, autopsy reports, interrogations, witness statements, security camera photos, handwritten letters, and more. Player's mission is to examine these clues, tackle four assignments, and finally solve Christine’s mysterious murder.

Each assignment players solve paves the way for a fresh set of clues. As players progress, new envelopes packed with evidence will become available to aid players in diving deeper into the mystery. The stakes get higher with every revelation and culminating when players solve the case and expose the murderer.

Get ready for a super fun board game where you become a geocaching expert. Move your character, solve cool challenges, and discover hidden treasures! Can you collect the most caches and become the champion?

Cache Quest is easy to learn, full of surprises, and perfect for players aged 7 and up.

The legend tells that in this desert, there are mysterious and valuable artifacts. So you will venture into it to achieve the greatest wealth for your people, but you must arrive to your campsite... alive.

Buried is a solitaire game, where the player must dig for precious artifacts and sell them for money (points) or water (action points) and arrive to the end of the path to score!

On your turn you must do 1 Action and then the Desert will take a turn. This will continue until the game ends.

Actions:

     Excavate: Choose 1 Artifact Card and take it to your bag, all the adjacent Cards of the same type are added to the bag as well.
     Exchange: Choose 2 Artifact Cards on the Desert and swap them.
     Advance: Move your Caravan 1 step closer to the Campsite by paying the cost shown on the limit you passed.
     Sell: Choose 1 Bag to sell their contents and get as many Water or Coin as their value, but never both!
     Overexplot: Pay the the water shown on the sun marker, to have an extra turn!


After you take an action the Desert would refill or slide the artifacts on the board! So the Desert will change every turn!

The game will end in these scenarios:

     You reached the campsite! Congrats you brought richness to your people
     The cards run out! The campsite is gone and you went left alone in the Desert!
     You run out of water and got stuck! You perish of thirst in the immense Desert.


Would you come back home as a hero? Or you will lose yourself by your greed?

—description from the designer

The Flavor Pack #1 contains 9 new Britain and Ireland-themed Events, with 5 of them being alternative Events for England, and 4 of them being generic Events that brings more life to this region of the map.
HavenwoodZ(HWZ) is a story-driven, hand held, choose-your-own adventure game situated in the Town of Havenwood. You will need to survive, complete tasks and avoid getting infected until help arrives.

boardgame: Chronicles of the Stellar Drive Empire: Voidpilot's Legacy
description:
Chronicles of the Stellar Drive Empire: Voidpilot's Legacy is a solitaire science fiction tabletop game where players command their ship and lead their crew through dangerous missions and exciting combat to earn their legacy!

Voidpilot's Legacy is a resource management and engine building tabletop game using cards, dice, and markers.  Players win by surviving 8 runs through their included Event deck, after which they tally up their Legacy Points to determine how they did.  The game includes optional scenario-based play to expand ways to enjoy and win the game.

Throughout the game, players participate in various Events, including exciting combat with adversaries that scale in difficulty as the game progresses, salvage and mining missions to collect resources to spend on ship upgrades to become more powerful, and visit colonies to earn credits and refuel.  Players can also choose to upgrade these events, increasing later difficulty and potential rewards.

Using a thematic Heroism mechanic, the player can choose to take ship damage or sacrifice crew members at critical moments to increase their chances of success during their missions!  Balancing hull, crew, and risk is critical to winning the game. Players lose the game when their ship is destroyed, they lose all of their crew members, or they run out of fuel.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet – Obsidian Flames
description:
Type-shifted Tera Pokémon ex Mix Things Up!
In addition to looking fantastic with their crystalline appearance, some Tera Pokémon ex have another feature that makes them stand out—they have an Energy type other than what you might expect for that Pokémon (like a Fire-type Eiscue). The Energy type and Weakness of these type-shifted Tera Pokémon ex match their new type, but their attack costs reflect the Pokémon's original type. Otherwise, they follow the same rules as standard Tera Pokémon ex.

—description from the publisher

Moon, Death + Dragons is the ultimate dice collection, bursting with four fantastical games
Each games is suitable for between 2 to 6 players, with more players the better! Each player starts with 20 gold pieces and through a mix of skill, gambling and the luck of the dice, play continues until one player lose all of their gold or the winner takes it all.

All games have endless replay-ability and are perfect for game nights filled with laughter and fun.

—description from the designer

Exciting new game that combines strategy and dexterity, offering an unparalleled gaming experience for all skill levels.

How to Play:

Sides Selection: Players roll a die to determine their faction.

Deck Distribution: Each player shuffles their deck and draws three cards.

Gameplay: Players take turns placing cards, attacking with tokens, and drawing new cards. Humans start the game.

Winning Conditions: Humans win by hacking the alien mothership, while aliens win by landing three spaceships on Earth.

—description from the designer

The adventure continues with the HeroQuest Jungles of Delthrak Quest Pack! In the dense jungle surrounding the mountains at World’s Edge, an ancient dwarven civilization finds new roots. A sacred artifact prized by the dwarven refugees of Kellar’s Keep has been stolen, and a blight has infected the jungle to its roots. As a powerful Berserker or Explorer hero, traverse the jungles and discover what vile secret looms beneath its canopy – before all is lost! Follow your path to unique endings through a choose-your-own adventure mechanic. Includes a Quest Book featuring 16 quests, 36 illustrated game cards, 29 detailed miniatures, and 39 double-sided cardboard pieces.

—description from the publisher

Command new ships and crew, use fearsome firepower, and gain glory with new achievements in Port of Call!

Port of Call is an expansion for every Dead Reckoning player, providing greater variety and additional paths to victory for experienced players, and only a few simple rules for newer players.

—description from the publisher

Niner is a small bidding trick-taker for 2 players loosely based on David Parlett's Ninety-Nine.

Both players are dealt a hand of 10 cards from which they must choose one card to act as the bid for the round.

Among the undealt cards, the top card is flipped over to reveal trump. The trump suit acts as another bid.

The player bid and the trump card together make a set of primary and secondary bids, which are worth 3 and 2 points respectively.

The game ends as soon as one player gets 9 points or after 9 rounds.
family: Series: Business Card Games (City Hare Studio)

description: A new edition with two game modes to challenge you head-to-head or make your game of Risiko! more exciting! New and adrenaline-filled strategies, new scenarios and worlds to explore: get ready for even more fun challenges with your friends!

UpDogs is the game of upsets and underdogs!

Play as one of four rival dog packs battling opponents for territory! The winner of any dog fight stacks their piece on top of the opponent, thereby eliminating the opponent's Dog and creating a dog pile. Taller piles have better odds in a fight. But watch out, even the smallest piece has a chance to upset the odds and change the powers at large! The Top Dog has the best odds of all, but there can only be one. Do you dare risk one of your Dogs for a chance to become the next Top Dog, or strategically send one of your hidden Underdogs that have the power to shift the odds in its favor?

The winner of the game is the player that remains after all opponents' pieces have been eliminated.

—description from the designer

Sea Dogs from the Port of Call campaign.

This is the 3rd expansion of the “Sea Dogs” module, to be played with the Port of Call expansion. To use it, shuffle these 12 New Sea Dog Illustration cards into your existing Sea Dogs deck.

If you are not playing with the Port of Call expansion, remove the Commander, Old Salt, Blue Jackets, Chief Officer, and Quartermaster–these Sea Dogs all use mechanics from from Port of Call.

Requires the base game and Dead Reckoning: Sea Dogs Expansion.

From the depths of the underworld and the shadowy corners of your nightmares comes the Necronians. Drawing their power from fear, they strike before even being detected. Creeping up from the ground and becoming even stronger by their growing numbers.

Kingdom Combat is a unique mix of a strategy card game and a tabletop war simulation. Choose your faction and build a deck from an expansive collection of impressive units, dynamic events, and surprising dirty tricks. Build up your homelands with interesting structures to gain resources to play even more powerful cards.

Kingdom Combat is a strategy card game designed for 2 or more players. You assume the role of the ruler of a faction. March your army across the battlefield and annihilate any hope of your opponents recovery from your devastating destruction left behind.

When you purchase a faction, you will receive the entire set! Everything you need to create multiple decks is included in the box. Here at Double Aye Games we have never been a fan of games where you have continuously buy packs and chase down the most powerful cards. We believe that it should be an even playing field and everyone should have access to the same pool of resources and cards. Depending on what deck you build and what strategy you use is the determining factor of who is victorious!

Kingdom Combat Mercenaries are thugs for hire. By use of their cunning and sneaky tricks to come up behind you and steal your gold or burn down your village. They will work for the highest bidder and do whatever it takes to get the job done. ​

Choose your faction and build a deck from an expansive collection of impressive units, dynamic events, and surprising dirty tricks. Build up your homelands with interesting structures to gain resources to play even more powerful cards.

description: Miniature wargames rules for refighting the battles of the Jacobite Rebellions from 1689-1746. It is designed to be played on a gridded board with model soldiers with two or more players.

boardgame: Kingdom Death: Monster – Bitter Beastcloak Promo Card
description:
This is a set of two promo cards, that came with the Bjorn miniature, which itself is not part of the game.

The set consists of a gear card and a glossary card that explains its use.

The Bitter Beatcloak is an accessory that says: When the monster deals damage to your body hit location, it gains a blight token.

The effect of the blight token is explained on the living glossary card.

Elsbeth is packaged in a graphic box that includes:

1 x Elsbeth hard plastic miniature
1 x Hard plastic Kingdom Death 30mm base and insert
1 x The Lost Echo character card
1 x Install guide
1 x Large matte art print

Elsbeth was born from her mother's armpit. So the settlement always said she never knew the way. Breathlessly struggling to keep up with the others as they journeyed through the gloom.

Often her directionless senses leaves her in peril, but occasionally a glint of opportunity is found lost in the gloom alongside her.

The mysterious city of Gormalak is living dangeoruos days. Hundreds of beasts and nightmare creatures emerge from its depths, and no one is safe.

Take a deck and explore the Black City, wield your influence, and fight for supremacy in the city. Each card represents one of the many troops, characters, equipment, spells, locations, and abilities you can use to achieve victory.

Circle of Blood: Rivals uses a gameplay system based on simple and easy-to-learn concepts that can be grasped in a single game. As players explore the game's possibilities, they will find that its simplicity gives way to a depth of mechanics that is both interesting and challenging.

The goal of the game is to earn more Renown Points than your rivals, with the winner being the first player to reach 25 or more points. Renown Points can be earned by attacking the Locations of rival players or by ensuring that they have no Locations in play.

Circle of Blood: Rivals is a project based on a setting with years of work in concept design and world-building. This card collection is conceived thanks to the AI technology developed by the team at Midjourney, combined with the digital art expertise of Miguel Ángel Lozano, one of its designers.

Each illustration has been guided, selected, and meticulously edited by real people. The firm intention of the studio behind this game is to expand the human team of artists and designers working on the project, but for that, we need your help at this beginning stage.

—description from the publisher

10 National Teams:
Italy, Germany, France, England, Netherlands, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Brazil, Argentina.

Originally released as Add-on during the Kickstarter campaign, it's currently available on their official site.

Twelve club teams:

Two additional card decks (20 new strategy cards + 6 playbook cards each)

More strategy, more powers. Expand your collection by adding 20 new strategy cards to each of your core decks. The booster decks also include 6 playbook cards each.

Twelve powered-up players from Team White, Team Black, Team Red and Team Gold.

Vakk | Paraiso | McGrey

It's the 1st issue of 4 programmed Limited Edition expansions (for a total of 48 players)

boardgame: Warhammer Underworlds: White Dwarf Exclusive Grombrindal Card
description: The 500th issue of White Dwarf magazine included this Warhammer Underworlds Fighter Card for Grombrindal, the White Dwarf. A special miniature of Grombrindal was released in conjunction with the 500th issue of the magazine. The magazine also included a special scenario for playing with Grombrindal in Warhammer Underworlds.

Standalone expansion for Dinostone.

Adds more cards and introduces 2 new abilities - Freeze & Trident
Also adds new concept of each player having "stamina" (life bar for direct hit attacks)

Cards for Solo play are also included in this expansion

When the fate of the world is threatened, your enemies become allies. In this Talisman Alliances: Fate Beckons cooperative game, join forces with fellow players and set forth on an epic adventure to complete five daunting Trials! In each Trial, players will need to place two Talisman on Places of Power, unseal the Portal of Power and defeat that Trial’s adversary. With a vast world of possible scenarios, this expansion to the Talisman strategy board game for teens and adults offers limitless games! Includes: 30 Starting Game Cards, Doom Tracker, Doom Tracker Token, Rulebook, 24 Double-Sided Strength/Craft Tokens, 5 Boxes with 5 Figures, 4 Envelopes with 20 Game Cards. This tabletop adventure game for ages 12+ is for 2-6 players. (Requires Talisman base game 5th Edition to play. Sold separately.)

The magical adventure continues with the Talisman Alliances: Fate Beckons game, with fresh characters, spells, Adventure cards – and cooperative play! (Requires Talisman 5th edition to play. Sold separately.)
    For the first time, contenders for the Crown of Command must form an alliance against evil forces – or the world shall fall! Band together with fellow heroes: share resources, plan and battle as one 
    Take on five Trials, unique challenges requiring strategy and luck! In each one, players must place two Talismans on the Places of Power, unseal the Portal of Power and defeat that Trial’s adversary
    As each Trial is completed, open envelopes and boxes to reveal five mystery figures, mystery cards and the objective of the next Trial
    The Talisman Alliances game includes 50 game cards that bring peril and aid in the form of enemies and strangers, magical objects and places to visit, plus a doom tracker, tokens and more
    With different Trials, adversaries and so many possibilities, go on a new journey every time! The accessible gameplay lets both beginners and fans jump into a game. Ages 12+
    Looking for exciting games for game nights with friends or Family Game Night? This fantasy game is a great choice, and strategy games make cool presents for teens and adults

Includes: 30 Starting Game Cards, Doom Tracker, Doom Tracker Token, Rulebook, 24 Double-Sided Strength/Craft Tokens, 5 Boxes with 5 Figures, 4 Envelopes with 20 Game Cards.

Ages 12 and up
For 2 to 6 players.
Requires Talisman 5th Edition to play. (Sold separately.)
Actual components may vary from those shown. 
—description from the publisher

The Mariestad Klimatspelet ("Mariestad climate game") is a strategic board game about creating a sustainable city. The players take the roll of an actor in the city and play project cards to make the city climate neutral.

Build green energy, reduce car traffic and expand green areas. But make sure you have the necessary money, contacts and research needed to make all of the projects work.

The climate game shows how we can build sustainably, while highlighting many of the challenges that we face along the way. The game has over 100 project cards based on real life concepts and ideas.

—description from the designer

Backstory

In the once-prosperous city of Paldon, a catastrophic, time-altering experiment shattered its advanced machinery and erased invaluable knowledge. Since then, the city has been divided into factions, debating the risks and benefits of restoring the technology while competing for influence.

The inventors are key players in the city's reconstruction, creating machines that bring life back to its core. While certain knowledge is forbidden, they continue their work, sometimes using rare substances like phlogiston. They sell their inventions on the black market and they don’t align with just one faction but collaborate with several to secure their own success and make their names known.

About the game

In Chronicles of Paldon, each player acts as an inventor with their own workshop located in the city of Paldon. The task is to rebuild the city’s machinery, which has malfunctioned due to the catastrophe. The machinery consists of a few major City Constructions and a large number of small machines.

To complete the task, players must carefully plan how to use their turns and apprentices to gather the necessary resources and skills, as well as how to best utilize the machines they have built. Machines can be sold for money or used to upgrade the workshop, but they can also be provided to factions in exchange for renown, with the amount of renown depending on the faction's influence. It's crucial to keep an eye on what the other players are doing, as their actions can directly impact each player´s strategy and success.

Renown points can be received in different ways, but mainly when building City Constructions and for the faction support (providing of machines) made during the game. The winner is the player with the most renown points at game end.

In the solo and co-operation mode, set before the catastrophic event, the player’s task is to destroy the machine responsible for the catastrophe before it ruins the city’s machinery.

—description from the designer

In this party game, you'll compete to find something you can say about two wildly different things.


     A judge draws a tame card and a wild card and reads them both out loud. 
     Everyone else has 90 seconds to come up with something that makes sense for both things.
     Funniest Response gets a point. First to reach 10 points wins.

When bees are creating honeycomb, they connect their legs together to form a chain, called a Festoon.

In this game, players compete the be the first to form a festoon. Players take turns placing hexagonal bee tiles adjacent to the other tiles on the table one at a time. The first player who places four bees in a straight line wins.

As players create advantageous patterns and block others, Festoon becomes a game of reluctant cooperation. Players must decide whether it is more advantageous to block another player's festoon or set themselves up for victory. The simple rules and strategic gameplay mean that anybody can play it, but victory can only be achieved by the player whose strategy comes out on top.

Only a few minutes to set up and explain, Festoon is a great warm up for family game night, or a breather between hours-long games.

—description from the publisher

We were invited to a magical house. Late at night while we are sleeping, a playful ghost and a mischievous cat enter the house and start creating a disorder.
Will you be able to see all the mess they made before everyone else?
In this game someone will play as the Ghost or the Cat, who will move over the cards that make up the house, while the rest have their eyes closed. Then a card will be turned over, and after 10 seconds the others will open their eyes to try to find out which card was turned over as quickly as possible.
Combine your memory and speed to win!

—description from the designer (translated)

Nos invitaron a una casa mágica. Bien avanzada la noche mientras dormimos, un fantasma juguetón y un gato travieso entran a la casa y empiezan a desordenarla.
¿Podrás ver antes que el resto todo el lío que hicieron?
En este juego alguien jugará como el Fantasma o el Gato, que irán moviéndose sobre las cartas que forman la casa, mientras el resto tiene los ojos cerrados. Luego volteará una carta, y pasados 10 segundos abrirán los ojos los demás para tratar de encontrar lo más rápido posible que carta se volteó.
¡Combina tu memoria y velocidad para ganar!

—description from the designer

"A unique social deduction game where players must work together to find the dog, but some want to sabotage the search! Can you trust your neighbor?"

8 Character cards 
8 Dog cards (each matches the color of one Character card)
56 Search tokens (each has a YES and NO side,7 per Character)
8 Role cards 
 (3 Good Neighbor, 1 Owner, 1 Nosey Neighbor - all allies)
 (2 Trouble Makers, 1 You Let The Dog Out - all allies) 
20 Location cards
8 Suspicion cards
2 False Lead cards
Town Map (6 tiles)

Aim: The "Good" side all want to locate the dog, while the "Bad" side wants to prevent that. The Good side wins if the dog is located AND the identity of the Nosey Neighbor is not revealed. The Bad side wins if the dog isn't located OR the Nosey Neighbor is revealed.

Players take a matching set of: 1 Character card, 1 Dog card, 7 Search tokens. Role cards (specific to number of players) are combined to make a deck (like Werewolf or Saboteur), then dealt out in secret to each player. Town Map is constructed and Location cards are shuffled, then one Location card is pulled in secret and added to the two False Lead cards, all face down. Then, Suspicion cards equal to the number of players are shuffled into the bottom half of the Location deck.

All players close their eyes - the Bad allies then open them,look at the secret Location and False Lead cards, and close them again. Repeat for Nosey Neighbor.(again, like Werewolf)

Player Turns - either:
A) Once per game, look at one of the three face down Location/False Lead cards, then put a Search token by the False Lead or on the location on the map - either YES or NO, truth is NOT required

B)Take the top card from the Location deck:
-- if it's a Location, put a Search token there, either Yes or No, then place face down in front of you.
-- if it's a Suspicion card, look at one face down Location card of any player, then announce what you've seen and put a Search token in that Location, Yes or NO. 
In either case, truth is NOT required.

When the last card from the Location deck is drawn, the search is over and a Neighborhood Meeting takes place: all players observe the Search tokens on the various Locations, and attempt to convince the OWNER who is telling the truth and who is lying. OWNER announces their chosen Location of the dog, then LET THE DOG OUT reveals themself and the actual location of the dog.

If OWNER is correct, BAD side gets one guess to identify NOSEY NEIGHBOR, if wrong GOOD side wins. If right, or OWNER picks wrong location BAD side wins.

Mythos is a competitive strategy card game for 2-4 players, where you build an army of gods, goddesses, and various mythical entities to battle against your opponent(s), gathering essence to power up to victory.

Each turn, you have the opportunity to draw cards into your hand, play cards into your party, and attack/use the abilities of your party. Some actions generate you essence, and gaining 20 essence is all you need to win the game!

Mythos has a heavy emphasis on emergent strategy and creating synergies. Curse opponents with the semi-demons Rakshasas, and then bring them crumbling down using a mighty earthquake with Geb. Grant your opponents ultimate misfortune by summoning the mischievous Yokai, Tengu, then feast on their remains with the ferocious Kali.

With over 100 cards to play with, there is truly no limit to the creativity and strategy you can express in this game!

—description from the designer

The city-building board game Foundations of Rome puts you into the role of an architect competing to own land and build magnificent structures! Build domūs and insulae, fountains, foundries, and more to increase your renown - gaining glory for yourself and the empire! With 96 wonderfully detailed miniatures in the base game, Foundations of Rome is a testament to the glory of Rome that you can bring to the table.

Foundations of Rome is the next, and biggest game to date, in the Dice Tower Essentials line and is designed by famed designer Emerson Matsuuchi.

On a player's turn they select from purchasing a new lot, building a new building in the shared city of Rome, or collecting income!

Players collect Glory Points at the end of each round based on the population and commerce they have brought to the city as well as gaining glory for civic buildings that score not only based on their own buildings, but those of their opponents!

With a quick setup time and easy to learn rules you will be on your way to achieving glory within Rome in no time!

—description from the publisher

description:
March 5, 2024, on the streets of New York City, a scent of fear hangs heavy in the air. In the last few days, a dark and sinister pattern has emerged – three lifeless bodies, each bearing the signature of a twisted predator, have been found in the dimly lit alleys of the city. The bodies of the victims, all seemingly healthy people, are covered with cruel cuts while missing organs. With New Yorkers afraid to step out at night from uncertainty and fear of becoming prey to this new serial killer, named publicly as “The Organ Harvester”, you step forward as their last line of defense. Armed with determination and a need for answers, you enter as the lead investigator to find the perpetrator before they claim their next life. The hunt for The Organ Harvester has begun.

Summer Season Promo 2024 of FryxGames.

Requires 2 city tiles in play.
Cost 9MC
Increase your M€ production 2 steps. Gives 1VP

Promo card X68.

Storm Edition: Every good camp needs a campfire, but a storm is coming! Can you build your campfire as the storm increases in intensity or will the rain get the better of you?

Components: 8 Storm cards; 12 Rain cubes; 1 Storm Tracker in rulebook)

Shuffle the Storm cards into the deck. If you draw one of these on your turn place the card on the Storm Tracker and place the appropriate number of Storm cubes. As the game progresses the storm worsens and you will increase the number of cubes to place.

Tinderblox is a fun, easy to learn dexterity game that comes in a pocket size mini-tin so you're always ready to play.

Challenge your friends and family to 'Play with fire' as you gather around to build a 3D campfire, but don't get burned! If you drop a piece of the fire you lose the game!

Draw a card and use your tweezers to add what's shown to the growing campfire. Be careful, if you knock over the fire, you're out! Be the last player standing to prove that you are the best camper. Take Tinderblox with you everywhere! A mini tin game that fits in your pocket.

Northgard: Uncharted Horizons is the first major expansion for Northgard: Uncharted Lands, a game of conquest and exploration set in the age of vikings.

This expansion adds a new dimension to the Northgard: Uncharted Lands gaming experience, with :


     New game modules that players can choose whether or not to use in their game, for greater replayability and new strategies,
     A single-player mode, widely requested by the community,
     New clans, giving players a wider choice of asymmetrical abilities to integrate into their strategy,
     New creatures to give players a hard time,
     And much, much more!


—description from the publisher

In this expansion, you and your crew of fellow Belters are charged with helping to construct the asteroid belt’s first space station. You will supply The Interstellar Foundry with the raw materials needed to forge the high-tech components for the space station’s construction. This expansion adds a new dimension to mining the asteroids of The Belt. It also introduces a “push your luck” mechanism that allows a player to catch up with their opponent if they fall behind in the construction, but they could lose all their gains if their luck does not hold.

—description from the ruelbook
A new action card and two new floor cards.

For the wave 2, as the 3 new games are offering more possibilities with 3 very different themes, we designed 3 new cards for each.

3 new cards for 12 Patrols: 3 New Kingdoms to defend!
    3 new cards for Clin9ic: 1 New Action cards and 2 New Floor cards
    3 new cards for Asteroid Miners: The Space Station Expansion cards. It also contains 3 new dice and 3 colored cubes...

This pack of 9 giant cards can be added as add-on during your pledge.

—description from the publisher

3 New cards for 12 Patrols with add 3 new regions to defend!

Regions:
Town Square
Shepherd's Green
Rocky Shoals

Add the 3 extra cards to your 9 base game cards. Draw only 9 cards, and play per the base-game rules with these 9 drawn cards.

In this haunted mansion you entered on a exploration streak, you and your companions must face monsters, vampires, ghosts, undead, skeletons, and werewolves, all bent on one thing – to scare you! So, muster your courage, and without trembling, find the right countermove to defend yourselves and manage to escape !
Will you be quick enough to enter the Halloween party when you hear the eerie formula before the doors close?

Each player starts with 10 cards, on each turn players will play cards to launch monsters to other players, who will try to counter, or start an Halloween Party.
To win the player needs to get down to 2 cards, entering the last room, and find a Escaper card to save itself and win the game out of this terrifying manor.

A Treasure Capturing Game. Ahoy Matey! Arrrgh you ready to compete in nautical battle of ultimate treasure capturing? Let the brawl begin!

Mini Game in Plastic Case with Backpack Clip on!

Players compete in a nautical battle to capture the most treasure chests, which can be obtained by filing a chest up with exactly 8 pieces of gold.

Players are each dealt 4 cards. In clockwise order players play treasure cards ranging from -2 to +3 to the center of the play area then draw a replacement card. If the sum of the gold equals exactly 8, the player who played the last card takes the cards and it becomes a captured chest.

When the last card is is drawn, all players play one additional card.  The player with the most treasure chests is the winner!

Ninja Slayer Trading Card Game is a two-player competitive trading card game in which anyone can easily build a deck.
Enjoy playing in Blitz Shield matches, where each player prepares five packs, or Constructed matches, where players collect their favorite cards and build a deck.
The match starts with the first player's turn, and your turns and your opponent's turns alternate until the winner is decided. The first player to deal 10 points of damage to the opponent wins the game.

—description from the publisher (translated)

ニンジャスレイヤー TRADING CARD GAME（以下、ニンジャスレイヤーTCG）とは、誰でも簡単にデッキが組める、2人用対戦型トレーディングカードゲームです。
プレイヤーがそれぞれ5パックを用意して遊ぶブリッツシールド戦や、好きなカードを集めてデッキを作って遊ぶコンストラクテッド戦で対戦を楽しみましょう。
対戦は先攻プレイヤーのターンからスタートし、勝敗が決まるまで、あなたのターンと相手のターンを交互に繰り返します。先に相手に10点ダメージを与えたプレイヤーがゲームに勝利します。

—description from the publisher (translated)

Skirmish of Sixes is a updated and modified version of the original Skirmishes of Honor.

Skirmish of Sixes is an original system in which fantasy battles take place between 1-4 players. Battles are 15-30 minutes with a traditional format of 6 vs. 6 teams.

You may like Skirmish of Sixes because:


     It has a straightforward system to manage combat mechanics including dice rolls, statistics, and abilities.
     The rulebook is designed to be printer friendly, coming in full color or black & white.
     It's an easy-to-learn tabletop game, with the rules being only 16 pages.
     Also included in the file are supplements with a reference sheet, character abilities, character sheets, enemy blocks, and missions. This whole package totals 38 pages, or 36 for the black & white version.
     Play with any materials you have as a fantasy/RPG collector. 


 Whether this be your miniautres, terrain, play areas, and dice. Skirmish of Sixes is miniatures agnostic and works with any scale.

     There are options to play solo/solitare, competitively against other players, as well as co-op play.
     Comes with seven written missions for different styles of play, including variable difficulty and number of players.
     Scripted enemies in solo and co-op that have distinct tactics and mechanics to allow for replayability.
     Party creation system including three tiers of units: 1 leader, 2 officers, and 3 soldiers
     Equip your characters with weapons, armor, abilities, and magic of your choice.
     Rules that allow for random placement of enemies and terrain, so each mission has a different layout.
     Optional game rules to change how you play.


-Published exclusively on DriveThruRPG as a pay what you want title.
