If the attacker wins they may move the attacking piece into the now empty space, rotating it if they wish.

Pieces may be placed with shields to delay an attack and/or covers to hide their type and strength.

A game for 2,3 or 4 players in which interlocking words are formed from coloured letters printed on plastic pyramids that enable them to be seen from all four sides of the playing area at once. The game is played in two stages, the construction stage and the reconstruction stage. The first player to reconstruct all his pyramids ends the game. The player who has reconstructed the most pyramids is the winner.

Monopoly: Home Bargains Edition brings the familiar thrill of the classic Monopoly game with a unique retail twist. Themed around the popular UK discount retailer Home Bargains, the game lets players experience the excitement of building a retail empire with a focus on the brand's iconic stores and locations.

In this edition, players begin their journey at the first Home Bargains store in Old Swan, Liverpool, and navigate through other significant locations such as Clydebank, Pontefract, Newtownabbey, Harlow, and Poole. As they move around the board, players will buy, trade, and develop these stores and warehouses, aiming to dominate the retail landscape.

Game-play follows the traditional Monopoly format, with players rolling dice to advance around the board, drawing Chance and Community Chest cards that can either help or hinder their progress. Instead of houses and hotels, players invest in Home Bargains stores and warehouses, adding a fresh and thematic twist to property development.

The goal remains the same: bankrupt your opponents by acquiring properties, charging rent, and strategically managing your assets. With official licensing from Hasbro, Monopoly: Home Bargains Edition provides a fun, competitive experience that combines the beloved elements of classic Monopoly with the charm and familiarity of Home Bargains.

Be the first to discard all of your cards by making pairs without being left with the Sunburnt card.

Naturist-themed with cards depicting a wide range of bodies.

Note: Cards contain nudity.
family: Versions & Editions: Adult Versions of Family-Friendly Games

description:
When the moon rises, the witches gather for a friendly strife: They exchange crystals for ingredients, which they need to conjure spells. For successful spells, they gain magic. Who will be able to gather enough magic the fastest?

Witchcraft: Midnights is an expansion which spices up the base game by adding global events that are triggered whenever a witch casts a spell, making it harder to plan ahead and adding more surprises each round. Witchcraft: Midnights also comes with five new familiars, whose abilities are more confrontational than the ones in the base game.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Europa Universalis: The Price of Power – Extra Player Set
description:
This add-on contains a full set of Deluxe player components, allowing you to add a 7th player to your EU:tPoP games.

Box contents:

Deluxe player tray w/ snap-on lid
    20 wooden Manpower meeples
    15 wooden Ships
    40 screen-printed wooden Small Towns
    8 screen-printed wooden Large Towns
    1 screen-printed wooden Prestige marker
    3 wooden Merchant meeples
    2 wooden cylinders
    30 wooden cubes
    1 dual-layered Player Mat
    2 Army/Fleet Mats
    1 punchboard with tokens

–description by publisher

Akkad is an intense strategy game of conquest, industry, warfare, and religion, themed around the Akkadian Empire in ancient Mesopotamia. Players will complete quests to gain Victory Points and earn the favour of the king, Naram-Suen. Expand your territory, build and upgrade your cities, collect resources and taxes, dig canals, raise temples, recruit armies for battle, march legions along the Tigris and Euphrates, and send priests to convert heretics to your cause.

The game is played in rounds that consist of four phases:
 1. Select role and worship cards, in which players will go in turn order to select a role card and a god or goddess to worship for that round. This will give a player access to unique abilities during that round of gameplay.

2. Reveal and event - an event is revealed that could have positive or negative effects on the board and/or on players.

3. Action Phase, wherein players will be able to carry out actions with their command tokens, such as moving their units around the board, developing their city, collecting resources, recruiting units, digging canals, building temples, sending priests to convert territory, and combatting rebels, monsters, or other players. They will also be able to use their selected role and worship cards which could have a significant impact on gameplay for everyone that round.

4. Prestige Phase, in which players will score any quests they have completed to earn victory points, heal any injured units, receive bonuses and generally reset the board. Role and worship cards will also be returned so that players can choose new card in the next round.

Once a player has received 9 victory points they are declared the winner and the game ends!

Akkad is a 4x (expand, explore, exploit, and exterminate) style strategy game set in the ancient world with real people, places, and events that have informed the gameplay, art and illustration, and mechanics of the game.

—description from the publisher

Zyxx is an abstract game of three-dimensional hide and seek. Two players take turns narrowing down their opponent's location by asking yes/no questions; the first player discovering the other player's position being the winner.

Players are also allowed a limited number of moves. The key strategy is to conserve moves but not let the opponent get 'too close'.

—description from the designer

Empiric is a card game to teach guideline based antibiotic use for common and important infections.

The game is designed for education for physicians and medical trainees including medical students, residents, PA students, NP students, and pharmacy students.

Content is primarily derived from IDSA, CDC and AAP guidelines to teach antimicrobial selection for common and important infections.

Learn antibiotic classes, mechanism, spectrum of activity and delivery options with color coding and icons built into antibiotic cards.

—description from the designer

A game where players learn about geography, route planning, and engage in brain-teasing puzzles while exploring diverse cultures around the world.

Game Overview
Earth, the blue planet in the solar system, is just a speck of dust in the vast universe. For us, Earth is vast and boundless, with so many places yet to be visited and landscapes yet to be seen. If we are too young to travel the entire planet, why not join our little monster in Globetrotter and tour our world together?

As the "Plus" version of 山河之旅 (Discover China), Globetrotter expands on the original gameplay, extending the map from China to the entire world! Through a game format that children are sure to enjoy, combining a game board and cards, players collect and explore to enhance their knowledge of the world, while also improving their observation skills, route planning abilities, risk avoidance, and geographic awareness.

Basic Mode

     Open and place the world map on the table. Sort all travel tickets by color and place them in the storage box.
     Each player selects a monster piece and a house piece of the same color.
     Shuffle all location cards face down. Before the game starts, each player is dealt one location card as a starting point, which is placed face up in front of them. Place the monster piece on the corresponding location on the world map.
     Place the house piece on the starting location card. The youngest player starts first. Draw four location cards from the deck and place them face up on the corresponding locations on the map. The game proceeds clockwise.
     Each turn, players roll two dice and receive travel tickets of the corresponding colors based on the dice results. If a "colorful" side is rolled, the player can choose a travel ticket of any color. Players can use any number and color of travel tickets each turn to move their pieces along the corresponding colored paths or save them for future turns. If the player ends their turn on a location matching any of the four face-up location cards on the map, they collect that card.
     Draw a new location card to replace the one taken, maintaining four face-up location cards on the map. The game ends when any player collects six location cards and returns to the starting point, winning the game.


Advanced Mode
Some features are added with the "Advanced" mode:

     Travel tickets trading
     Once city one player
     Special events

boardgame: Gloomhaven: Buttons & Bugs – Arena Challenge Scenario
description:
#5.5: Arena Challenge

A new promo scenario originally available at Origins 2024. This scenario is meant to be played after scenario 5. After completion you have the choice between Beetle's Carapace and Rodent's Fang items and then you proceed to Scenario 8.

Tunnel Entrance: Demons take a shortcut through the tunnels to a different part of the map. During setup before shuffling tiles, replace two of the Mountain tiles with the two Tunnel tiles (entrance and exit). After creating the map, place one rotation token on the tunnel entrance and another on the exit. 'Rotating' the entrances causes the exist and entrance cards to switch places. This is a Mountain tile only for the purposes of Scroll placement.

Tunnel Exit: Any Demon that lands on the Tunnel Entrance tile travels to this tile on their next movement. It is very difficult to capture demons while they are entering and existing the tunnels. Obelisks receive a strength penalty of -3. (A strength 4+ Obelisk can capture strength 1 Demon in the Tunnels.) See Tunnel Entrance tile for setup instructions. This is a Mountain tile only for the purposes of scroll placement.

boardgame: 3 of a Kind: Mini Bookmark Version
description:
3 of a Kind Mini Bookmark Version!

     Choose a Category.
     Choose 3 Adjectives in a line.
     Players think of 1 answer in the Category for each Adjective.
     Score 1 point for each player you match with!


Category Cards
Ice Cream Flavors, Subjects in High School, Parts of the Human Head
Green Things, Pizza Toppings, Alice in Wonderland Characters

Adjective Cards
Most Scientific, Saddest, Smelliest
Deadliest, Friendliest, Oldest
Best, Most Likely to be a Pro Wrestler, Weirdest
family: Versions & Editions: Travel Versions of Non-Travel Games

description:
In the world of Vikings, Valtivar: Thrúd æn Modi presents two single-player modes, around a dice-rolling duel. The objective will be to defeat one of the two gods of Norse mythology.

Each round, the player will have three tries to establish their best dice pool to defend themselves or attack their opponent, as well as to collect blessing tokens. The opponent will be entitled to a single throw, however depending on the god chosen, he has his own mechanics to inflict penalties as well as devastating blows.

The player has a major advantage since he can invoke one of the three gods by offering him blessing tokens only once per game. These gods can trigger some pretty powerful effects.

The games are short and intense, but you will have to balance between risk-taking and defence.

—description from the designer

For weeks, the young astronaut Gordon Chip has been navigating the boundless expanse of space. Now, as he roams an ancient asteroid on a mission of exploration, he receives a crucial directive: scan for signals of alien life on various frequencies. With anticipation, Gordon grabs his high-tech communicator and listens intently into the void...

In Gordon Chip, players embark on a thrilling quest to capture the highest frequency each round. Roll the dice, push your luck, and outsmart your opponents with clever moves to tweak your roll.

Will you be the first to catch a signal from the stars?

—description from the publisher

Dread Not! is a fast paced tabletop game which can be used to recreate the large fleet engagements from the Great War.

Dread Not! gives you the option to fight large engagements without bogging down like many other Naval games.

Dread Not! covers both the British Royal Navy and the German Imperial Navy with both navies having their own unique play style. Included are a multitude of different ship classes along with the rules to create various different fleets.

Will you keep your ships safe in dock or is it time to take to the sea and change the course of the war?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: My First Adventure: In the Heart of the Jungle
description:
Today, you are trying to reconnect with your past.
Today, you will explore the jungle and its ancestral ruins!

Enter a story like no other, a story where each of your choices changes your adventure!

In the Heart of the Jungle is the 11th book in the "My First Adventure" collection of stories in which you are the tiny hero.

Enter the jungle of your ancestors in search of the mysterious Jade Stone and discover your origins.

Who do you want to play: Lalo the big sister or Atu the little brother?

Now your adventure can begin. You will be able to read this book normally, from left to right, but quickly, you will face choices materialized by pages cut into three. Spin the part of your choice and find out what will happen next.

After several choices, you will reach the end of your adventure... Will you succeed in finding the legendary stone and opening the doors to the past? Once you have finished reading, you can start again to discover new paths or try with another character.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Missione Roma imperiale: L'enigma di Giulio Cesare
description:
The game contains 60 cards and a special magical lens, each card offers an enigma with a clue to discover to identify the next card: you can immerse yourself in an incredible adventure while consolidating the contents of primary school history.

Decrypticon
To discover the clues, boys and girls will have to use a special magical lens included in the game. By placing the Decrypticon on the back of some special cards, useful clues will appear to continue the mission.

Incipit
The Professor, a famous history scholar, is visiting the Colosseum together with his students when he suddenly disappears. Who kidnapped him and why? To solve the mystery you will have to venture on a journey through time in which you will find yourself dealing with Roman Emperors, gladiators, Praetorian guards and... a supposed Julius Caesar! Solve the puzzles and, card by card, bring the Professor back to the Colosseum.

PLAYSCAPE – “Explore, solve and learn”
A new line of board games and books which - based on the Escape Room model - make some of its principles their own to apply them to educational content. In the products of the PLAYSCAPE line, children will have to proceed with the adventure by solving codes, enigmas, puzzles and riddles , linked to specific educational contents, in a fun and adventurous way, while strengthening their logical skills and reasoning.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Arcana Ludica is a means to share your passion for board games with anyone unfamiliar with them, regardless of their age. This workshop is designed for group settings. (School classes are ideal, but the workshop also works well with adults.)

Each session is led by a Shaman who is well-versed in the workshop's structure. Under their guidance, participants explore games with increasing levels of engagement and enjoyment. Each mini-game is followed by a discussion in which participants share their impressions and compare them with the previous games. Through this process, they gradually uncover the art of game design.

boardgame: Batman: Gotham City Chronicles – Season 3 Stretch Goals
description: This is the boxed set of all Season 3 Boardgame Stretch Goals for Batman: Gotham City Chronicles. It includes Batman (Azrael) and Ace (the Bat Hound) as playable heroes; Calendar Man and The Drowned as playable villain leaders/lieutenants; the Robin Minions (x4) as elite henchmen; and all their associated sheets, tiles, life-point tokens, and Versus Power cards. Also included is a Two Faces' double-sided metal coin.

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Shang Chi & Silver Sable
description:
Two new characters join Marvel: Crisis Protocol with the Shang Chi & Silver Sable character pack.

Trained by his father in the martial arts from a young age, the assassin Shang-Chi became a living weapon. After learning the truth about his father's crimes, Shang-Chi cast him aside and began working with fellow heroes to do what is right.

Silvija Sablinova convinced her father to train her to hunt war criminals. After his death, she took the name Silver Sable and her skills have taken her all over the world—fulfilling contracts to support her team and homeland.

These two miniatures are accompanied by two character stat cards and six team tactics cards.
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Black Panther, Chosen of Bast & Namor, the Sub-Mariner
description:
The Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Black Panther, Chosen of Bast & Namor, the Sub-Mariner character pack offers players a new version of T'Challa, with Black Panther, Chosen of Bast acting as a spiritual conduit for the people of Wakanda, providing him with powerful gifts for both the mind and body.

In his Marvel: Crisis Protocol debut, Namor, the Sub-Mariner king of the sunken kingdom of Atlantis wields his mystic trident and super-human strength as a bulwark between land and sea.

These two miniatures are accompanied by two character stat cards and five team tactic cards.
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Mojo Ball Scenario Pack
description:
Players enter the Mojoverse and pit their squads against one another in an alternate universe version of fantasy football courtesy of the Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Mojo Ball scenario pack.

Featuring unique scenario rules for one-of-a-kind combat, this scenario puts players in a tactical struggle to maneuver their characters into position and score touchdowns for victory points. Each pack contains materials for two players to play the Mojo Ball scenario.

description:
A fun and exciting tabletop action and adventure game inspired by the world of Super Mario.

From Epoch Games, the two-player Super Mario Rally Tennis game comes with collectible Mario and Luigi figures. Slide left and right to receive the ball and press the button at the right time to recover it.

The game is compatible with other series of Super Mario toys and family board games from Epoch Games (sold separately).

Product characteristics:


     Includes 1 game of Super Mario Rally Tennis
     Includes collectible Mario and Luigi figures.
     Slide left and right to receive the ball and press the button at the right time to recover it.


—description from the publisher
family: Video Game Theme: Super Mario Bros.

description:
Zaykan, the Hermit has started a war between the Adendei and the humankind!

In this Red War expansion new energies reenforcements creates an awesome boost to your base game!

Choose a side, Protect and Win!

Each booster pack contains 8 cards (7 common cards and 1 holo random card)

boardgame: Cuff The Bluff: A Game of Dicey Deception
description: Cuff the Bluff is a bluffing dice game. It tests who really has the best poker face and can successfully bluff the numbers on the dice. Roll and select a player to either bluff or play it straight. Successfully bluff them and they’ll take the die. Can’t convince them, you’ll take it back. Collect a sequence of six dice and you’re out of the game. Action cards and black dice with additional powers bring even more twists and turns. Last one standing wins the game!

Set 2 nearly doubles the content of Set 1. It does not add new rules, and in fact comes with no rulebook. It adds 55 new heroes, 104 new treasures, doubles the size of the challenge deck and Quest decks, and adds 12 new map pieces.

—description from the designer

The traditional game Khanhoo from the Ming Dynasty has spread across the globe, evolving into various tabletop games, most notably the renowned Rummikub.

The Yaofish game Khanhoo Master is based on the original rules of Khanhoo and incorporates elements of Chinese mythology.

Game Objectives
Be the first to play all the cards from your rack.

Game Preparation

     Place all number cards and Yaofish cards face down on the table, shuffle them to form the central draw pile.
     Each player takes a rack and draws 10 cards from the central draw pile, placing them on their rack.
     Each player receives a mythical creature card and takes the corresponding companion card, placing it on the creature card.


Game Play

     The player who most recently petted an animal starts, and play proceeds clockwise.
     On a player's turn, they must play cards according to the card rules. If unable to play, they draw a card from the central draw pile and place it on their rack.
     Players can play cards directly from their rack that match the card rules, or play any number of number cards to combine with the groups already in play. However, all card groups on the table must conform to the card rules.


End of the Game
The game ends under one of the following conditions:

     A player plays all the cards from their rack, winning the game.
     The central draw pile is exhausted. The player with the lowest total sum of card values on their rack wins, with ray cards counting as 14.

Set 3 adds two new dimensions to the Factions series. It provides 1-8 player solo/co-op skirmish play with a reactive AI. It also provides a 1-8 player co-op/solo campaign of 12 missions and a storyline that brings the athletes behind the heroes to life.

—description from the designer

Players are attempting to fully decorate their RV site by playing cards onto their tableau: a welcome mat, an outdoor table, plants, unique items like a pink flamingo, and sets of three items each for the following collections:  folding chairs, wind chimes, and fairy lights.

The first player to complete their RV site ends the game and gets bonus points, but points are also awarded for theming one's collection.  Many items have a theme, such as pirate, southwestern, beach, or space.

Cryptid cards such as Bigfoot, Jackalope, and Lizard Man may be used to steal other player's cards, but reacting with a camera will counter that play and also score a point for capturing evidence of the cryptid.

Chicago Grand Slam ups the ante of the classic Chicago card game with the elegance of a unique game board and ruleset, loaded with more strategic depth and replayability.

Play your cards at the just the right moment and try to make the best poker hand, all while attempting to be the first player to obtain their Chicago Marker and get both of your pawns across the goal. But watch out, you may end up moving backwards!

boardgame: Cyberpunk Unfolds: Pop-Up Mystery Escape Game
description:
A single chapter escape adventure trying new things from Pop-Up elements, foldouts and 3D paper figures. We want you to be able to explore the escape room scenario and even build it. You will unfold the escape room progressively until you build a large structure to investigate. No additional materials such as scissors or glue are required, everything can be simply put together.

—description from the publisher

The Tzerzurians have returned to Zura after they had been locked behind magic seals for millennia. Over time they had turned into myths, then into Whispers of a long lost past, but are now back to this world. Nobody, including the Tzerzurians, recalls their place in the world anymore though.

"A Way Back Home" is a tactical push your luck game with a bag building mechanism that can be played on multiple boards. The base game includes one double sided board per player with more to come over the next few years. Each board not only expands on the story, they also each have a unique twist in how the game plays and may add new components to interact with.

The core game play remains the same across each board: players try to link light sources for different purposes across up to six different paths while managing penalties, the contents of their own bag, as well as the contents of the general pool.

The game includes:


     120 crystals in 6 different colors
     4 double sided player boards
     4 drawstring bags
     6 character cards for board "B"


—description from the publisher

boardgame: Heroes of Might and Magic III: The Board Game – Stronghold Expansion
description:
Brings units from the Stronghold faction and adds the underground.

The harsh lands of Krewlod are filled with barbarians craving for victorious tales to echo through time. Two of them, Crag Hack and Yog, join forces to vanquish necromancers from troubled Erathia.

Video Game Theme: Heroes of Might & Magic

boardgame: Heroes of Might and Magic III: The Board Game – Conflux Expansion
description:
Brings new units from the faction Conflux and portal mechanic.

In the Conflux, Elementalists and Planeswalkers rule their realm amid oppressed spirits, elusive Phoenixes, and other elemental creatures. Join Tarnum as he battles Elemental Lords and confronts his magical biases to become a Wizard.
family: Game: Heroes of Might & Magic III
Video Game Theme: Heroes of Might & Magic

boardgame: Heroes of Might and Magic III: The Board Game – Cove Expansion
description:
Brings units from the Cove faction and sea travel and encounters.

The waters and islands of Antagarich teem with pirates' clashing desires. Jeremy and his crew must navigate these treacherous waters, with only luck on their side and the promise of a mysterious artifact at the end of the journey.
family: Game: Heroes of Might & Magic III
Video Game Theme: Heroes of Might & Magic

description:
Dustlings is a fast-paced, crazy game with lots of take that and capture the flag elements. Each of players are led by a selected faction of creatures living in the Forgotten Corner under your bed.

Grublins and Crawlies have a clear goal - to lick the rolled hard Candy as quickly as possible into their world and which slips away whenever you try to catch it. Dustbuster a Soap Bar must remove a certain number of filthy creatures from the board to restore hygiene and cleanliness.

The key to the game is clever movement and placement of creatures on the board and using their special abilities. In the exercise of the powerful action sequences are helped by booster tiles, the so-called power-ups that we draw for the beginning of each round or when our creature eats a sweet crumb.

Moving around the board, you must avoid the Spots left by your opponents, floating around here and there suffocating stenches and other surprises. Creatures can weaken each other by biting each other and using abilities.

The Dustbuster is massive and can divide and merge, but every round it dissolves and can disappear in a cloud of bubbles...
Each round in Dustlings is a mini puzzle during which the player tries develop optimal movement. You can gain an advantage by being smart and creative action combinations and, of course, taking advantage of the opponent's mistakes.

The gameplay is there very dynamic, so there is no question of long-term planning here - it should be done adapt to the situation on the board and react flexibly to the movements of others players. Randomness is limited to drawing booster tiles.

—description from the designer

A team quiz game. For each question asked, you must cite all the elements belonging to a given group. For example, the names of the seven dwarves, the names of the four presidents of Mount Rushmore, etc. To help each other, each team has three cheat cards at the start of the game, wild cards that can replace a missing element. The team that gives a complete list wins a point in the category, a new cheat sheet and plays again. The team that provides zero answers loses a point previously won. The winner is the team that collects a point in each of the seven categories. Note: on each card, one of the questions is presented in the form of an image or photo.

Loira do Banheiro is a fun, fast and terrifying game in which participants test their luck as well as being able to plan their steps with strategic care, always keeping an eye on the other players' points. Illustrated by one of the most renowned board game artists in the world.
Who will be responsible for the school's custodianship? Who will have the courage to stay in the bathroom? And yet, who will be the crazy person who will open one of the booths in search of higher scores, even taking the risk of encountering the fearsome blonde?

Open a booth if you just drew a shout card, grab a roll of paper when you draw a “knock-knock” card, use the roll if you want to follow another participant when opening booths, turn off the lights, kick the toilet, play three strands of hair in the vase…

But be careful: if you find the blonde, that's it!

boardgame: Ashes Reborn: Red Rains – The Spawn of Shadowreck
description:
The haggard, spired city of Shadowreck has become host to a hulking, insectoid Chimera. Screams echo through the streets as folk are snatched away, their bodies devoured, or worse, entombed in webs in the catacombs beneath the streets. There citizens hang, helpless, watching the pulsating egg sacs whose hatchlings they have been doomed to feed!

Play as returning Phoenixborn Rimea, Sembali, Victoria, or Hope, each wielding exciting new signature cards. Use the included new illusion magic player deck to slay this new fiendish terror. Confound the monster with deceitful spells before its brood can erupt!

—description from the publisher
family: Game: Ashes – Rise of the Phoenixborn

description:
You can choose one or two of these festive tree tiles instead of the burning trees. In the final scoring, all animal tiles adjustend to the festive trees, that match the number of the trees on the the tile, score 3 extra points.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Summoner Wars (Second Edition): Red Sun Rising
description:
Note: This is a box set released for the French and Spanish editions of Summoner Wars (Second Edition). It contains the Tundra Orcs, Phoenix Elves, Cloaks, Skyspear Avians, Fungal Dwarves, and Eternal Council faction decks.

The Itharian sun shines high in the sky. Its once peaceful rays are now the color of blood. Elves, humans and other races roar with fury as the sun sings intoxicating songs of violence to them. New Summoning Stones are thrown from the planet's crust, granting their maddening powers to those who are eager to use them for selfish purposes. Thus, the Summoners' war expands with even more combatants fighting battles in new territories. Beware of the Red Sun and its promises! Or it will drag you into the carnage that is to come.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Summoner Wars (Second Edition): Violet Moon Waxing
description:
Note: This is a box set released for the French and Spanish editions of Summoner Wars (Second Edition). It contains the Obsidian Dwarves, Sand Goblins, Wayfarers, Shadow Elves, High Elves, and Swamp Orcs faction decks.

Summoner Wars: Violet Moon Waxing adds 6 new factions to your Summoner Wars base box.

The day gives way to a disturbing moon that refuses to leave the sky of Itharia. For thirty days it sits in the skies, disturbing the minds of those who want to govern the planet and its population. New Summoning Stones appear in hidden places around the world where they are quickly claimed by those who want to reconfigure the Summoners' battles. Will these new factions bring calmer minds capable of putting an end to hostilities? Or will they just make the balance of power more difficult? Be careful with the Violet Moon, because dangerous plans are hidden in the shadows of the night!

—description form the publisher

Black Site is a battle royale style game played on a module board where players are trying to deduce where the other players are while also keeping their own locations a secret.

—description from the designer

In this compact game you try to get rid of your cards as quickly as possible. But that feat is quite a handful: 5 colours, 5 numbers and 5 effects can be played and combined during your turn. You can deflect card effects, stop them or even make them stronger. In addition, suddenly appearing trap cards provide unexpected moments of fortune, bad luck or just a whole lot of fun.

But beware: victory is fleating. You have to survive a whole round until your next turn and you still don't have any cards in your hand.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Grill for Glory is a sizzling BBQ-themed board game designed by Kaleb Ardoin, featuring captivating artwork by Jacob Ardoin. This culinary showdown immerses players in a fiery competition, where each participant vies for victory. To triumph in this flavorful face-off, players strategically play various cards to create delectable cooks on their grills. The first player to master the art of grilling and achieve three cooks emerges as the ultimate champion.

But the game's spice doesn't end there. Players can also earn bonus points by skillfully fulfilling special orders, adding an extra layer of strategy and excitement to the gameplay. Ultimately, it's all about accumulating the most points before the grill cools down, and the winner emerges as the barbecue maestro. Grill for Glory serves up a delicious blend of strategy and culinary flair that's sure to keep players hungry for more.

—description from the designer

Words Are Hard is a series of rapid one-on-one matchups that can be played with any number of players. The dealer faces opponents one at a time until defeated, at which point the deck is handed to the winning opponent who becomes the new dealer.

In each matchup, the dealer faces their opponent and flips over a card to reveal an image. To win the matchup a player must say a word that starts with the first letter of the depicted image and then slap the card. If a player slaps the card before saying a valid word, they lose the matchup.

The winning player collects the card and becomes (or continues to be) the dealer. Play continues clockwise around the table. The goal is to collect the most cards.

—description from the publisher

A deckbuilding game where YOU play the part of one of the world's master hunters.  Build your map, research beasts of legend...and then collect the clues you need to find them.  Hunt them down, and take their heads as trophies!  Build your collection and you might get a shot at the most dangerous prey of all...

The hunt is on.

You will search the mountains, forests, lakes, swamps, and towns of the world for the hidden creatures of myth and legend.  Everything from vampires...to the powerful Baba Yaga are on your list, and you hope to add their heads to your collection.

Travel the world.  Build a map.  Collect clues.  And put together an arsenal of the weapons, both mundane and legendary, needed to bring down the world's most dangerous game.

Collect enough trophies, and you may just be up to the challenge of hunting the most lethal of beasts.  But be aware:  You are not the only hunter, and the competition is fierce.

Core set provides all the cards needed for two players.  A four player expansion is available, as well as a Complete Set which contains all available expansions.

—description from the publisher
family: Players: Games with expansions that change player count

description:
The first game in our new Pocket Games series!  Choose your legendary pirate and ship...then take to the seas and ports in search of treasure!  Fire cannons, board your opponents, rule the Caribbean!

You and your opponent will search the ports of the Caribbean for the four legendary treasures.  But finding them is the EASY part...holding onto them will be the challenge!

Use your cannons, boarding parties, and any tricks or crew you can pick up in the store to help win the day, and sail away with the prize!

All our signature pocket games use our unique "handbuilding" system, and include high quality cards stored inside cool (and durable) metal mint tins!  Everything needed for two players.

—description from the publisher

One of our Pocket Games series!  Choose your attorney and get to work convincing the jury.  You'll need to present evidence and witnesses in order to make your case...while using objections and motions to throw opposing counsel off balance!

Test your powers of strategy and persuasion!

This trial is going to be a challenge...do you think you have what it takes?  One by one, you've got to use evidence and witnesses to lure jurors to your side.

HOWEVER, every step you try to take, the opposing lawyer will attempt to stop you.  Objections.  Motions.  Sidebars.  But they're not the only one with a briefcase full of tricks!

All our signature pocket games use our unique "handbuilding" system, and include high quality cards stored inside cool (and durable) metal mint tins!  Everything needed for two players.

—description from the publisher

One of our Pocket Games series!  A cyberpunk vision of a future ruled by a tyrannical Master AI System...and it's up to you, a talented hacker, to stop it.  Your skill won't be enough.  You'll have to complete hacking contacts, make some credits, and buy powerful gear for your system.  You might even need to hack your opponent...but watch out for the backtrace!

You've got skills, kid...try not to get fried...

You're off to a good start.  You've done some minor hacking jobs, and developed your skills...but you're nowhere near ready to take on the Master AI System.

Take contracts.  Buy cool tech gear for your rig.  Hack your opponents.  Watch the for backtrace, or your precious gear could get FRIED.

All our signature pocket games use our unique "handbuilding" system, and include high quality cards stored inside cool (and durable) metal mint tins! Everything needed for two players.

—description from the publisher

One of our Pocket Games series!  Your people seem peaceful...for now.  But as a tyrant, you must always be on the lookout for challenges to your authority.  Be sure to use all your powers to defend your spheres of control...while driving your opponent's citizens towards REVOLUTION!
It's your country, and they are NOT going to take it from you...

The threats to your power are everywhere.  Good thing you wield complete power, authority, and control.

Keep control of the government, military, economic, and ideological arenas...and you might ward off revolution.  At least for a while.

All our signature pocket games use our unique "handbuilding" system, and include high quality cards stored inside cool (and durable) metal mint tins!  Everything needed for two players.

—description from the publisher

The set up for the game is easy, just take the big base piece out of the toolbox and set it on the table. The first person will grab a pipe out of the box and place it in the base, then it will go around the table with people grabbing a pipe (and a connector to attach the pipe) and adding it to the structure.

It is designed to be wobbly off the bat, but when you drop some pieces, the game isn’t over for you! You will add those pieces to your plumber’s pile and choose a piece from there instead of the box on subsequent rounds.

A player wins if they place the last pipe from the toolbox, so catch up if you are behind! A player can also instantly lose if they manage to tip the base over, so be wary. Lastly, the whole group can win together if they manage to place every single connector on the structure at once! (The game is designed so there will be a few pipes left over.)

The first version of the game is 3D printed. A printed and shipped version will be available post-Kickstarter. 3D print and play STL files for single private household use will also be available.

—description from the designer

A World above the Cloud is an exploration and conservation board game inspired by Ladakh, a beautifully tended high-altitude mountain desert in the North Western Indian Himalayas.

You can play this game in three ways: Cooperatively or Competitively or Solo.

In the cooperative game, you and your fellow players are the Guardians of Ladakh, on a quest to revive the Stories of six regions. Each turn, the Guardians Hike across the land to Gather various Elements and Seeds. They must Protect sets of three crucial Elements (a Wilderness, an Essential and a Culture) from each region in order to revive the lost Stories.

However, as the players Gather the Elements, waves of Hazards are triggered, destroying the precious Elements and endangering the Bees. The Guardians must work together, Protect the Elements, manifest Spirits, resist the Hazards and Plant the Seeds wisely to keep the Bees safe until all six Stories are revived!

In competitive mode, players take on the role of Storytellers, racing to tell the most of the six Stories. Caution and strategy are crucial to dodge Hazards, outpace opponents and become "The Greatest Storyteller of Ladakh".

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Don't let the Bed Bug bite! No, really. It's huge; you could lose an arm.

Speaking of bugs, this set adds the Bug Race from Star Munchkin to the ever growing roster of Munchkin. If compound eyes and wiggly antennae are your thing, these cards are for you!

This 56-card Munchkin expansion is ready to go marching one-by-one into your deck! Except for the DeviAnt – it does its own thing. Stay at a Roach Motel where you'll be Snug as a Bug in a Rug, and it will make you a Bee Lever! Before you reach for your rolled up newspaper or can of Wasp Spray, make sure you look down and check to see if The Floor Is Larva!

—description from the publisher

Crow Drinks Water is a party game for 3-6 players. lt involves hand management, bluffing, and exciting blind draws.
In Crow Drinks Water, players take on the role of different crows. Players act simultaneously, collecting clean or polluted tributes, and then offer them to the Holy Grail in order to advance on the Holy Tree.

boardgame: Purgatorio: Men of Iron Volume VI
description:
The struggle between monarchs in Europe, particularly between the Holy Roman Emperor and the Pope, would spawn well over a hundred years of conflict in Italy. The Investiture Controversy caused a split between the Italian city states and even the people within the city states. Guelph was the name given to those who supported the Papacy—while the Ghibellines were the supporters of the Holy Roman Empire. Guelph cities tended to be farther away from the Papal States and closer to the Holy Roman Empire, and Ghibelline cities tended to be farther away from the Holy Roman Empire and closer to the Pope’s temporal power.

Battles raged across Italy from the mid-1100s to the mid-1300s with both sides ending up on top at one time or another. This sixth Men of Iron game covers some of those battles: beginning with Frederick Barbarossa trying to recapture rebelling provinces in Italy in the late 12th century, taking a spin through the 13th century with a few battles that spelled the end of direct Hohenstaufen rule of Italy, and ending with a war that myth says was fought over the theft of a bucket from one city by another!

The battles include:
Legnano 29 May 1176 – Frederick Barbarossa fights the Lombard League for control of northern Italy.

Cortenuova 27 November 1237 – Frederick II, grandson of Barbarossa, tangles with the second Lombard League for control of northern Italy.

Montaperti 4 September 1260 – Florence and Sienna fight one of the bloodiest battles in medieval Italy—as seen on TV, or in GMT’s Inferno!

Benevento 26 February 1266 – Manfred, King of Sicily, dies in battle in southern Italy against Charles I, also King of Sicily, securing Charles I in the title King of Sicily.

Tagliacozzo 23 August 1268 – Conradin III, King of Jerusalem, is captured and executed after a battle in southern Italy against Charles I, King of Sicily.

Campaldino 11 June 1289 – Florence and Arezzo fight in northern Italy. Famous Italian poet Dante Alighieri fought in the battle. Later, his brand of Guelph would lose power in Florence, and he would be forced into exile.

Zappolino 15 November 1325 – Modena and Bologna fight, not over an oaken bucket stolen from a well, but over a long standing feud replete with raids and reprisal that had occurred almost a century.

This game will use 9/16" counters.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: History: Wars of the Guelphs and Ghibellines
Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description: From the comfort of your own home, solve a mystery in every room of the house to escape. Packaged in a colourful, compact tin, this is a great travel game for all the family. Contains a compact game board, a 100 cards covering all categories, 24 Word Search Sheets and counters.

boardgame: Green Box of Games: Roll, Set, Match!
description:
A dice drafting and matching game for the Green Box of Games using extra dice.

Setup:
Remove the green background cards. Shuffle the rest and deal 6 cards to each player. Place one tile with each symbol face upon the middle of the table. Have cubes within reach. Select a starting player and give them six dice(one of each colour).

Play:
The staring player rolls all the dice. All players select one card from their hand and plays ot fave down in front of them. Then players start taking turns. In a turn you may either play a card from your hand matching the number of any die or place a die onto a tile. Doce cannot be moved after they are placed, and you may not place a die onto a tile where there is already another. Turns continue until there is only one die left. Place it on the last available tile and the round ends.

Scoring:
Each card played os scored against a single die. You score 1 point for matching the number, 1 point for matching the color, and 1 point for matching the symbol of the tile. If the card matches all three you score 4 points. Take a number of cubes to keep track of your score. Keep playing until all players have been starting player once and count the total score to determine the winner.

Justice is a solitaire game played with any standard 78-card Tarot deck. The cards 1-20 of the Major Arcana (trump suit) are placed randomly in a 5x4 grid. Players draw from the deck of Minor Arcana cards, until depleted, using the cards to manipulate the grid and put the Major Arcana cards in order. By using a single Minor Arcana card or by taking the sum or difference of two cards, you can choose different cards from the grid to move, but you only ever have 1 type of movement available to you on a turn (Swap or Slide) and 1 direction (Left-Right or Up-Down). To change either the type of movement or the direction, you must discard your entire hand. The movement type or direction are also must be changed whenever the Justice is moved to a different place on the grid. To win, players must plan out their moves carefully so as not to waste cards. For an advanced version, at the 0 and 21 cards to the grid.

—description from the designer

Immerse yourself in a world where honor, power, and mysticism collide.

Will you strive for wealth and political influence, navigating the treacherous waters of corruption? Or perhaps you'll follow the honorable path of the samurai, leading with courage and integrity. Maybe the tranquility of a Zen garden calls to you, or the allure of a geisha's delicate grace. For the daring, the shadows offer a thrilling path of stealth and cunning, where assassination and thievery are the tools of your trade.

Craft your destiny by mastering hundreds of skills and acquiring powerful symbols that aid you on your journey. Each turn presents new opportunities and challenges, as the balance of power shifts in favor of those who give the most.

Who will be the fastest, the most cunning, or the most honorable to complete their way and claim victory? The choices are yours, but the outcome is never certain.

The Way awaits. Will you find your path and emerge victorious?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: Roll to Move 2024 Promo Cards
description:
2 brand new promo cards given to web store orders of $100 or more during Roll to Move 2024. Included are two new artifact cards:

Axe of Lorgar: $450. Whenever you successfully scavenge, gain d3 rage. Once per turn, at the start of a turn, use 2 rage to gain +2 move and +2 initiative until the end of the turn.

Helm of Orello: $750. +1 max grit. Whenever a passage map tile is placed, you may recover a grit.

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: The Next Big Score Supplement Pack
description:
When you live life on the edge of the law, every day is a gamble, but the best gambles are those with the biggest reward. It's hard not to always have an eye out for the Next Big Score, with a payout of your dreams. All you have to do is assemble a crew to pull off the heist; in, out, and you'll all be stinkin' rich. What could go wrong!
 The Next Big Score allows your Hero Posse with an Outlaw or Performer to put together a 'crew' to turn almost any Mission into a Heist, with big danger and big rewards! This 15 card Supplement includes the Next Big Score Adventure card outlining the mission modifiers and a chart for Complications that can arise, as well as a new set of Encounters themed for the heist, and an all new deck of Big Score Roles for your Heroes to take on during the Adventure. Will you be The Brains, The Muscle, the Getaway, or maybe even the Smooth Talker? When the Outlaw of the group says he knows of a Big Score, you know it means trouble, and a whole lotta Loot!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: Warden Mark VI Sentries Enemy Pack
description:
Laying dormant in the desert sands of the Blasted Wastes, the Wardens are giant robotic guards, created and deployed with a single purpose…to prevent anyone or anything from ever escaping this harsh alien prison world. When their passive scanners detect large groupings of Scavengers banding together, or any activity or technology with the potential to allow escape, the Warden Mk VI Sentries are activated, pulling themselves up out of the sand to crush any and all resistance and put down uprisings of the prisoners. They act without mercy, without remorse, and their judgements are final.
 This Enemy Pack contains everything you need to encounter the Warden Mk VI Sentries. Included are 3 Large Warden Mk VI Sentry models, 3 x 40mm Bases, the large Enemy Record Sheet, and all of the Threat Cards needed to add these Enemies to your games of Shadows of Brimstone.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: The Double Skulls: Tavern Tales – Book Two
description:
This is the second book in the series and its quests are centred around spiders and their spider queen.

It introduces new mechanics, all listed in each quest in the monster stat blocks, and features web tunnels for Zargon players to help spiders retreat and attack in larger numbers. Each quest details the card placements to make up the quest board and details enemy placement along with any other scenario based elements or enemy upgrades that may be in that quest.

These dungeon cards can be used to make up your own adventures and the lack of the one width corridors really opens up exploration and team placement when heading into unexplored areas.

9 Double sided dungeon cards
6 Quests - also printed on the cards to look like an old book.

—description from the designer

The High Priestess is a solitaire game played with any standard 78-card Tarot deck. Each day for seven days, the High Priestess receives three visitors to her mountaintop temple. The visitors are looking for spiritual guidance, and the High Priestess imparts her knowledge to help them find balance in their lives. The game is played out over seven rounds. Each round a player draws 3 Major Arcana (Visitor) cards and attempts to find balance for them by playing cards from the Minor Arcana deck to both sides of each Visitor. The sum of the cards on one side of a Visitor must be equal to the sum of the cards on the other side. Also, the total sum of both sides must be equal or greater to the value of the Visitor card. The Minor Arcana cards may come from two different hands (the Knowledge Hand and the Experience Hand), each with its own limitations. Finally, the High Priestess has special abilities to manipulate the sums, at a cost. When the 3 Visitors have found balance, all cards in play are discarded and a new round begins. To win, you must find balance for all 21 Visitors before the Minor Arcana cards have run out.

—description from the designer

All the cards needed to expand your monster hunting adventure to four players!  More players, more monsters, more fun!

—description from the publisher

Add new weapons and allies to your ArchVenatus monster hunting adventure!  Powerful steampunk weaponry...legendary hunters from literature...all new strategies available!

—description from the publisher

Curators work together to thwart the attempt of the evil emperor Nerotus from destroying the books of the Bible. As curators you are trying to collect the books of the Bible in your archives before Nerotus completes his collection.

Your mission is to preserve God's written word by collecting the books represented as tiles and placing them in your archives. Each player has their own bag of tiles, 12 cards in their hands and an archive board. Be careful as drawing a black tile deploys Nerotus' soldiers and you lose books from your archives. This co-op game will leave you rooting for each other in this race to defeat Nerotus!

Employ strategy when it comes to placing tiles and playing cards, you never know what you will draw from your bag. Every game is sure to be different as you change your approach, you never know know what you will draw.

Will Nerotus succeed or will a curator rise above the rest and be named "Expert Curator"?

From the Jersey Devil to the legendary Sasquatch, add powerful monsters from the Americas to your ArchVenatus monster hunting adventure!

—description from the publisher

Start your ArchVenatus game with the master hunter of your choice...granting you a bonus throughout the game!  All master hunters based on historical hunters of legend!

—description from the publisher

The ArchVenatus Deckbuilding Game of Monster Hunting...Core Set PLUS all FOUR expansions and add-ons:  Four Player, Master Hunters, Big Guns, and American Monsters!

You get all the monsters, weapons, hunters, and more needed for four players to enjoy a monster hunting adventure spanning the globe!

—description from the publisher
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description: Set out on a quest to be the "Master Merchant" as you manage your hand with open drafting, deck building and purchasing of essential oils from biblical times. Work your stall in the market and gain the most prestigious consumers earning the title "Master Merchant".

boardgame: The Silver Bayonet: Egypt – Shadow of the Sphinx
description:
Face dangerous new foes, recruit new soldiers, and uncover the mysterious treasures of Ancient Egypt in two new campaigns, one competitive and one for solo or cooperative play.

Somewhere beneath the shifting sands lies the forgotten knowledge of the pharaohs – magic granting power over wind and rain, life and death, and even time itself. Napoleon didn't cross the Mediterranean simply to conquer Egypt, he sought these ancient secrets. No one knows what he found, but his military victories since then speak for themselves. Now, as Bonaparte continues to burn his way through Europe, desperate nations have sent their own special units across the sea to search for a counter and end his rampage.

Egypt: Shadow of the Sphinx is a supplement for The Silver Bayonet, in which the players' special units explore the mysteries of this great land, venturing into lost cities, forbidden ruins, and even beneath the Pyramids themselves. Contained within are two campaigns, one competitive and one for solo or cooperative play. Also included is a new recruitment list as well as a number of new soldier types, and the equipment that might give them an edge, but they will still have to face an array of terrifying foes, including mummies, werejackals, and serpopards, many not known to the living for more than 3,000 years...

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

boardgame: The Feds: New Orleans City Card
description:
New city card given to backers of the game during the Kickstarter campaign.

CRIMINALS SET UP AND UTILITY TOKEN RULES

At game start, place only 6 criminals on each location and leave the remainder in the bag. Also, place 1 utility token on each location: 2 face-up and 2 face-down. At game end, the player with the most strength at a location wins the token and scores its value in points.

SIREN TOKENS RULES

At game start, place 1 random siren token on each location. After Step 2, if a location has a number of field agents equal to or higher than the number on the siren token, the player with the most strength (no ties) arrests any 1 criminal from that location. Then, remove the siren token.

CLARIFICATIONS

Infiltrate: If the flipped mole is a special agent, the player flipping the card uses the power and the owning player does not (unless the player taking the turn has flipped her own card). Patrol: A player should not try to "feel" the criminal tokens to pick a particular type.

VNTYPL8S is a party game in which you get to create your own vanity license plates. Each player receives an owner and requirement card, then uses those topics and characters to guide the creation of their plate. Players then reveal their vanity plates so that other players can try to guess which owner matches which plate. Those who are the first to guess correctly and the plate creator will both earn points.

—description from the publisher
family: Organizations: Game Designers of North Carolina

description:
The USNC continues the war against Atriox and and the Banished. Mission control needs you to help the Master Chief organize units and complete missions all around the galaxy as quickly as possible.

Use weapons, vehicles, soldiers, and more to sabotage your enemies and finish your missions first. Destroy, steal, and swap cards in HALO: Mission Command, which is based on the HALO video game series.

Hello and welcome to the BOOMburg Battle Arena where the most celebrated tank crews have assembled for an all-out battle for gold & glory. So get ready to crush buildings, grab those power-ups and make things go BOOM!

Choose your celebrity tank Captain, like Jonesy Ninelives of Crew Tomcat or Rosie Rhino of the Charging Armored - then outsmart, outmaneuver, and outblast your rivals in the ultimate arena battle.

BOOM Patrol is a competitive tank battle game that plays like a mash-up of Mario Kart and Battlebots. Whether you Medal - or get blown into next week comes down to your strategic and tactical decisions. All in a game that cares more about fun than precision. 'Cause if it looks close enough, it's close enough to crush with 30 tons of treads and armor!

Featuring an intuitive and innovative movement system, programmed command cards, asymmetric tank captain abilities, and videogame-like logic, this is just a blast to play. And with the toy-etic cardboard tanks, you will find yourself making tank noises as they rumble across the arena and turn their turrets with a "TINK, TINK, TINK," before firing.

—description from the publisher

Whether you love (or love to hate) cheesy holiday movies, this game packs more festive clichés than your warm little heart can handle. Add some spice to any holiday movie or show, and turn those predictable plot points into memorable merry moments one “unexpected” kiss and snow-covered sleigh bell at a time.

Earn the most points by matching your cards with a Christmas movie (or show). But watch out, any card you discard can be stolen by other players!

—description from the publisher
Four new Machine cards that you can shuffle into the Machine deck when playing with the Moloch expansion.

A Stargrave supplement devoted to generating and running solo scenarios in which players hunt bounties across the Ravaged Galaxy… or perhaps become hunted themselves!

It's hard to live with a price on your head, especially in the Ravaged Galaxy, where bounty hunters can be found on every planet. Most are amateurs, folk with a gun and an eye for a payday, but some are deadly professionals. A few aren't even motivated by the reward, but by vengeance, redemption, some notion of justice, or the pure thrill of the hunt. They're the truly dangerous ones. No matter what drives them, once a new bounty is posted, the hounds take up the chase and, more often than not, it all ends in violence…

Dead or Alive gives Stargrave players all the tools they need to generate solo bounty-hunting scenarios, including a variety of different settings and locations, a host of complications to be faced, and, of course, a large rogues' gallery of unique outlaws. With the random scenario generators in this volume, players can set up a great number of games of Stargrave with no two being the same… all without an opponent!

—description from the publisher

The board game AZ kvíz: Nové otázky is based on the rules of the popular Czech TV competition 'AZ kvíz'. 
 Are you already well educated enough that nothing surprises you in the AZ kvíz? Then try the new version of the game with brand new questions. Your brain will be bothered by tricky questions in all disciplines from biology to social sciences to art. 
 The rules are the same as in the TV competition. The winner is the one who can connect the three sides of the game plan with the correct answers. 
 Usually its a game for 4 players with three 2-on-2 battles (semifinals and final). Average playing time is 30 minutes.
This promo-only Landmark Scoring Mini-Expansion contains 15 Landmark Scoring Cards to add to the cards already available in the Cascadia: Landmarks expansion.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
SCALE UP YOUR CAMPAIGN!

Unleash bigger battles, wider conflicts, and new stories, spanning solo, head-to-head, and campaign play in this completely stand-alone scenario-driven variation of the popular Five Parsecs from Home tabletop game.

Tactics takes adventure wargaming from starports and back alleys to the battlefields of Unified Space. This scenario-focused version of Five Parsecs from Home is all about creativity:

The 212-page, full colour, Royal-size (15.6cm x 23.4cm) hardcover features:


     Play solo or with friends, in single games or campaigns, with or without a Game Master.
     Make your own scenarios for the troops you choose, playing games your way.
     Tactics allows you to take Five Parsecs beyond small skirmishes to multi-unit battles: Big tanks, big monsters, big events, and platoons of troops slugging it out.
     Features an array of troops, characters, creatures, and situations.
     Packed with random tables to keep you facing the unexpected.
     Tactics is also a stand-alone game, yet fully compatible with 5PFH, with rules for transferring characters and events between the systems.


MULTIPLE GAME MODES:

CAMPAIGN GAMING

Great for individual battles, Tactics is even better for campaign gaming.


     Play battles that feed into each other, creating an overarching storyline.
     Multiple scenario types, from skirmishes to grand battles and evolving objectives.
     Story Event Generation table.
     100 scenario seeds.
     Advancement system allowing troops to gain experience as well as your favorite characters.
     More detailed advancement system to create exciting stories with the potential to surprise you at every turn.


PICK-UP PLAY

Enjoy one-off battles between multiple players:


     Points-built armies.
     Army building guidelines.
     Suitable for friendly club tournament play.


SOLO GAMING

Combat rules include ‘AI’ mechanics for solo play, managing the enemy while you command your own forces.


     Game Mastering advice for objectives, side plots, complications and scenario components.
     Solo campaign rules to allow vast story arcs.
     Scenarios and options aimed specifically for the solo experience.
     Expand solo play to two or more people on the same side against the AI enemy.


THE COMBINED GAME

Or simply blend the options! Play a friend head-to-head, continue your story in a solo campaign, then join up again for a Game Mastered scenario... all in the same storyline! A group of friends could even run a shared story in separate parts of a much larger conflict.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: Swarm Pack #3 – Void Spiders
description:
An Enemy Swarm Pack is a themed set of cards focusing on fighting swarms of a particular Enemy Type, as well as a new set of Spawners for that Enemy Type. In this case, the pack focuses on fighting large swarms of Void Spiders, and a grouping of Egg Sacks that spawn new Void Spiders during a Fight. Also includes Enemy Record Sheets for OtherWorld variants of Void Spiders, with the stats and modifiers worked into the Enemy Record Sheet itself, as well as new themed Elite Charts and Brutal sides for these variants. This set also includes a new Mission themed for the swarms of Void Spiders, Burn ‘Em Out!

—description from the publisher
White Word Tile you can use to replace a word tile from the base game to change one set of words into another... and it's board games themed.

As the Dicktective, your mission is simple: match the suspect to the dick drawing and rack up the points. The Dicktective with the most solved cases is the big weiner! With over 140 hilarious and scandalous category cards, you’re in for a visual treat.


     Choose a Dicktective and a category card
     The Dictective puts on the mask.
     Everyonce Doodles some dongs.
     Put your dick in the box.
     Dictective passes out dicks to the suspect they believe drew them.
     The Dictective reveives 1 point for every suspect correctly matched to their dick.


BONUS *** The Dictective gives out one bonus point for the good wood award!

Dicktective includes over 140 category cards and 3 twisted categories for a total of 6 specialty cards to add to the pleasure.

boardgame: Ukrainian F-16: Peace has a price
description:
Ukrainian F-16: Peace has a price is an exciting board game where the player takes on the role of an F-16 fighter pilot who carries out important missions to clear the Ukrainian skies of enemy aircraft and other threats. The game is based on strategic planning and tactical decisions, which allows the player to feel like a real aviation ace.
The game is built on activating actions on cards by placing d6 cubes. Each action on the card has a specific die value required to activate it.

Dice Hockey is ideal for 2 players, 4 players as teams, or for tournament play. Match your skills against the competition and determine who is the Dice Hockey champion! -description from publisher

Dice Hockey Challenge has players assume a coach-like role during a hockey game, positioning their pawn-represented hockey players on an ice rink, and moving them along a track that follow’s that position’s usual whereabouts on-ice during an actual hockey game, in accordance with the results of dice rolls. One tries to move the various pawns to positions that are advantageous to scoring or blocking shots, where the pawn that is in possession of the puck needs to have clear access to the next pawn they wish to pass the puck to, or to shot on the opponent’s net. Shooting on the net allows a roll for the goalie protecting that net, in an attempt to stave off successful shots.

Rift Runners is a trading card game featuring vtubers from around the world. Gameplay is inspired by classic TCGs like Yu-Gi-Oh! Collect cards and build your deck. Select a Rift Monarch for access to special powers. Play fighters, equipment, and actions and attack to reduce your opponents HP to zero.

You are a dog. You love bones! Dig through the cards and be the first dog to collect the bones. But be careful, the other dogs are just one card away from finding a bone.

Digbone! is a card game for 2-4 players. Players will take turns playing a card to one of two piles. This will let them dig through the opposite pile in search of the valuable Bone cards. First player to add the required number of Bone cards to their hand wins.

—description from the designer

Saloon Shuffle is a fast-paced, strategic card game set in the Wild West, ideal for players aged 8 and up. Players start with 8 cards and take turns matching the suit of the face-up card or playing Special Cards that can dramatically change the course of the game. Unique cards like Jail, Dynamite, and Bandit introduce exciting twists and require clever tactics. The first player to discard all their cards wins, but with the unpredictability of Special Cards, every game is a thrilling showdown. Perfect for game nights, Saloon Shuffle combines easy-to-learn rules with deep strategic possibilities, ensuring fun and excitement for all.

—description from the publisher

Boundless Horizons redefines immersive gameplay, blending role-playing adventures with collectible cards in an ever-expanding universe.

Boundless Horizons isn’t just another TCG or board game—it’s a groundbreaking adventure experience! Combining the thrill of card play with strategic board game elements, players must navigate dynamic terrain challenges and balance their strategy between battling rivals and overcoming the game’s own obstacles.Each session promises a multifaceted, epic quest.

In Boundless Horizons, we’re not just offering a game—we’re inviting you into a world of adventure and strategy. Imagine summoning powerful monsters, casting magical spells, and using extraordinary abilities with your cards. Navigate dynamic terrains, battle legendary monsters, and solve ancient puzzles as you search for precious Unique Components. These fragments of ancestral power are key to unlocking new abilities and shaping the destiny of the Boundless Horizons world. Our game is designed to be immersive, flexible, and tailored to your unique playstyle.

Join us on this epic journey and discover why Boundless Horizons is the new way to play and explore!

Comber Cat is a relaxing and cute cat-themed number card game.


     Perfect as Party Game for 2-5 players aged over 8!
     Arrange the number of cats in a specific order to score, the player that collect the most cards wins!
     Use Special Cat Cards (such as bomb/shield/cat king) to surprise and win your opponents! 
     Content includes 100 game cards and 1 manual.

Island of Fortune is a Roll & Write Game with a Dice Drafting mechanism. Adventurer compete for the finest treasures on a long forgotten, mysterious island.

The game is played over a series of rounds determined by the number of players. Each round, players select dice to take actions on their sheet. They can enhance their abilities, search for treasures, explore the island, or catch fish. Additionally, there are challenges that players can complete to earn extra victory points.

May the fortune be with you!

—description from the designer

The game of luck, wit, and bit of stupidity.

The objective of the game is to be elected the President of Camerai. To accomplish this, you need to be the player with the most voter points.

Each player starts off with 10 voter points. When that amount gets down to zero, that player is eliminated from the game. The first portion of the game will continue until two players are left. The final two people will compete in a presidential debate to determine the winner of the game. Each remaining contestant will get a chance to answer a question about some aspect of politics in Camerai. The two contestants will take turns answering the same question. All previously eliminated peers will get a say on who wins the debate, so be careful who you attack! Politics are dirty and people definitely will remember names.

Eliminated players will be able to assign a single point for each debate question asked (including the final plea). How they vote is entirely up to them.

If anyone says anything really dumb, feel free to record the moment and remind them for a lifetime or realize that they are just human beings trying their best and be civil about it. It’s up to you. I mean, it’s your galaxy. We really don’t care.

Solo Leveling: Board Game is a cooperative tactical board game for 1 to 4 players based on the popular webtoon and novel 'Solo Leveling.' Players take on the roles of Hunters from the series, tasked with clearing dungeons inhabited by various bosses. Following in the footsteps of the protagonist Sung Jinwoo, players confront bosses he has previously defeated, who now stand in their way once more.

The game starts with the instant dungeon's Blue Poison Fang Kasaka and progresses through selected dungeons and bosses, culminating in defeating the Architect. Each dungeon features unique mechanics, requiring players to strategize differently each time. Additionally, there are 9 Hunters, including Sung Jinwoo, each with distinct personalities and abilities, ensuring a fresh experience with each playthrough.

Solo Leveling: Board Game includes two game modes: Cooperative Mode and Solo Leveling Mode. In the cooperative mode for 2-4 players, each player selects a Hunter from the original series to form a team and navigate dungeons sequentially. While non-Sung Jinwoo Hunters cannot level up, they can enhance their equipment to prepare for greater threats ahead. The Solo Leveling Mode allows players to experience the game alone, taking on the role of Sung Jinwoo to clear dungeons as in the original story, utilizing the abilities of the Shadow Monarch.

In addition to the struggle against the Cosmic Hegemony, you have been given a new task: Find Allies within the worlds of the Rim for the Intergalactic Council.  Visit the Rim Sectors with your Space Cruiser!  Build these alliances and they will help you when called upon.

—description from the publisher

Get ready to Dominate the Freight in this thematically unique debut title from Armada Games! Choose your rig and race your friends and family across America in a game full of tension with a one of a kind endgame that guarantees tight finishes. Deliver cargo to your destinations, collect payouts, out-manueveur, outwit and block your opponents on your quest for victory!
3-6 players
45-75 minutes
Light strategy
Light economics 
High randomization
Symmetrical gameplay
—description from the designer

A hilarious twist on the classic game featuring 24 animals and their distinct droppings. The game plays like classic Bingo in that there is a caller who pulls tiles and reveals them one by one.  The players scour their boards in hopes that they have the tile that was called.  With different ways to win with 4 in a row or blackout (when the whole board is filled), game play time  can vary between a few minutes or longer, and can be tailored to the age group of the crowd. This game of chance is a fun way to learn about familiar and new animals and their droppings.  There is an accompanying booklet with additional fun animal facts too!

The fun, piratical, fast-paced card game! There are treasures abound! It's every pirate for themselves with skullduggery and plunder.

The aim  Stolen Treasure! is to collect and bury Treasure Cards. Buried Treasure Cards count towards your score. The first pirate to reach a score of 1500 points is the winner!

During a turn a player can perform TWO actions. There are FOUR legal actions: drawing, burying, piracy and wagering. Only TWO actions can be performed per turn. Any combination of actions can be taken during a turn. 

    Drawing: Player picks up one card from either piracy deck or treasure deck (keep piracy card hidden, but you must reveal treasure card).
    Burying: Place one treasure card from hand onto the table face-up (cannot bury treasure gained within the same turn).
    Piracy: Place one piracy card from hand onto the table and resolve its effect.
     Wagering: Place any number of treasure cards onto the table and pick one opponent. Opponent must accept the wager and place down the same amount of treasure value. Rock-paper-scissors and winner takes all.


—description from the designer

Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of nature with Forest Shuffle: Woodland Edge.

This expansion set for the beloved Forest Shuffle game introduces new flora and fauna, enhancing your strategic play with lush edge-of-the-forest habitats. Encounter diverse wildlife, discover hidden pathways, and manage your woodland resources to thrive.

With stunning artwork and engaging mechanics, Woodland Edge brings the enchanting forest environment to life. A set of 36 cards is making every game session a captivating journey. Perfect for nature lovers and strategy enthusiasts alike, Forest Shuffle: Woodland Edge offers endless possibilities for exploration and adventure.

—description from the publisher
