description:
The goal of Temple is to bring one of your stones to the marked Artemis field on the opposite side.

In ones turn, a stone has 2 options to move.


     WALK Move the stone to an unoccupied adjacent field by following the path. A stone can only move forwards or sideways, never back.



     LEAP A stone can leap over an adjacent stone to land on an unoccupied field unharmed or outside of the Temple and be removed (Leap of Faith).


If the stone leaps over a different colored stone, the opponent stone is removed from the game. If it leaps over a stone of the same color, nothing happens to that stone.

You can leap over more than one stone in your turn, provided that you always land on an unoccupied field in between. The direction may change by 45 degrees after each unoccupied field.
Stones cannot leap over 2 or more Stones next to each other.

Temple is won by the first player who places one of his stones at the opposing Artemis field.

—description from the designer

Friba is a game about disc golf. Players make throws and try to reach from start to the finish (basket) with as few throws as possible. The game is currently available only in Finnish language but English version is planned (if there is at least someone interested).

Key features:

     Players make progress decisions using only two cards. This speeds up the game flow.
     Throwing cards are transparent. You can flip them around and place over the map to easily see where your disc would end up.
     Non-aggressive interaction with happenings-cards. Players benefit from situations that other players create.
     Luck as currency. Luck can alter the rules to your benefit. Leading player gets generally less luck than players behind.
     All maps have six significantly different variations. This brings gameplay variation and possibilities for adjusting game length.
     Simple rules without need to constantly check charts etc. from rulebook. Dice roll results are found on used cards directly.


—description from the designer
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Long ago, across a vast desert there existed a city of gold, Zahab.

In Zahab players take on the role of ambitious merchants who travel around a rondel, build a hand of trade cards, and use those trade cards to convert gold and jewels into victory points.

There are three types of victory points each of which gives a boost to certain actions throughout the game. The winner is the merchant who has accumulated the most victory points across all three actions.

Sci-fi solo survival roll and write game. Instant setup, 1 hour play time, high difficulty.

Futuristic Soviet Communist orbital waste engineer left behind on a lonely dump station.

Build structures, yield resources, overcome incidents to last for 75 turns until help arrives or repair the evacuation shuttle and flee the planet.

Roll 3 D6 dice and use 2 of them for Actions. Roll one more and combine with the one you left for Accidents check.

—description from the designer

Magical Merchants

     Magical Merchants have smuggled their way into the Age pile to sell you trinkets with “awesome” powers.
     Unfortunately, some of these powers aren’t as awesome as they seem.
     But don’t worry! Complete the trinket’s objective if you want to pocket it and score extra points!
     When you’re ready for a new trinket, a "magical" merchant is just around the corner, waiting to sell you their latest and greatest! (Maybe keep your receipt, just in case.)


11 Trait cards, 40 Trinket cards

Deeplings

     Lurking in the fathomless darkness are Deeplings, which feature the new "suppress" mechanic.
     When you suppress a card, you hide it face-down underneath a trait in your trait pile.
     Suppressed cards are worth 1 point each. And because they don’t count as traits, you can grow in power while keeping your trait pile small!


18 Trait cards, 2 Age cards, 1 Catastrophe card

Glitterlings

     Glitterlings live in a happy-go-lucky land of make-believe where childhood never ends and cupcakes and marshmallows meet for tea.
     These Sparkly Balls are all about CHANCE! With the right amount of luck, huge new combos are possible.


18 Trait cards, 2 Age cards, 1 Catastrophe card

Moonlings

     Moonlings are weirdos. Not only do they speak their own language, they also force you to play with fewer cards.
     But these unexpected visitors have some unexpected benefits too, allowing you to give unwanted cards to opponents and even rewarding you for having a lower Gene Pool!


18 Trait cards, 2 Age cards, 1 Catastrophe card

Fuzelings

     Fuzelings combine the art and mechanics of Deeplings, Glitterlings, and Moonlings. They can help you get bigger bonuses from Drop of Life effects and trigger new combos!


10 Trait cards, 2 Age cards, 1 Catastrophe card

Privateers are individuals licensed by governments to participate in warfare at sea. No matter how vast the oceans may be, once fate intervenes, avoiding confrontation becomes impossible.
Among these privateers, those with abundant wealth and stand last. They will be awarded the highest honors.

The representative sorcerer of the house in the annual exam competition, Daringly steps into the library during the forbidden hours for students. The high-level secret book is worth the risk to sneak in and study. The harder, the more worthwhile, and the more risky. But if one dares to read it, one must study until becoming the ultimate in that field! Otherwise, the accumulated behavior points may be deducted until none remain. Let's find the most intelligent Sorcerer student.

Beyond the small hill not far from the town, Across the clear stream that runs by the village, you will come across an agricultural hillock bustling with a market full of fruits and vegetables. Here, you can be both the grower and the one who sets the market prices yourself. The farm that can make the most money by the end of the harvesting season will be named the ultimate farm of this hillock.

Desítka is a completely new type of trivia game. Each round in the game has 10 questions and 10 possible answers. All players get a chance to answer in each round of questions. If you answer correctly, you get one of the answer tokens as a point. When it's your turn again, you can look for another correct answer. However, at that moment you run the risk of losing the points you earned earlier in this round. Will you play it safe or take a risk?

This special edition brings 100 rounds, 1000 questions and answers that will test your knowledge of the history and present of the Olympic Games, with a primary focus on Czech athletes.

This game was created in official cooperation with the Czech Olympic Committee.

A suspicious individual was seen fleeing from the park where the victim's body was discovered. Was he responsible for the murder of a tour guide, or was he just a dupe in someone else's devious plan? Assist the police in solving this case and determine which one of the five suspects is the real killer.

Players will use their detective skills and sift through the evidence, which includes police documents, forensic reports, photos, communication logs and more. Players will apply deductive reasoning to connect the information, eliminate the suspects and solve the murder.

A man has just returned from a hunting trip in the Alps only to find his wife's lifeless body on the bed of their hotel room. In the middle of nowhere with no acquaintances in sight who could have a motive to murder her? Or was it suicide? Follow the trail of potential suspects and dive into the intricate details of their past and present to unveil the culprit behind this heinous crime. Can you crack the case and bring the perpetrator to justice, or will the killer slip through your grasp?

Players must sift through a comprehensive case file of evidence, including crime scene photos, forensic reports, witness statements, police documents and more. Players must find suspicious details in the evidence and reveal the killer. By using their deductive skills players will eliminate suspects and gradually will solve the murder.

促织 (Cuzhi) is a competitive game that transports players back to the Xuande period of the Ming Dynasty of China, where a palace entertainment named Cuzhi (cricket fighting) was popular among the royal family. Every year, the cabinet collected crickets from the provinces, a time when generals would crouch on the ground shouting the names of crickets, merchants would focus on appreciating the jars, and farmers, while busy harvesting grain, would not forget to bring along some dogtails for cricket fighting. Players will take on the role of a town mayor, the subordinate of officials in various counties and townships, and in this era where the emperor's interests influenced the country, they must find their own way to survive and thrive, while also finding entertainment for themselves.

促织 (Cuzhi) is a board game that combines the ancient Chinese cricket fighting culture with the German worker placement mechanism. In the game, players need to use their own workers to work in different areas to obtain various effects.
You can do a series of interesting activities in this board game: collecting crickets, harvesting fodder, manipulating the market, hiring village heads, cultivating crickets, etc. In addition, you can also pay tribute to the dignitaries in different regions to obtain salaries and other rewards, and strive to become the most respected player in this game after five rounds of games.

—description from the publisher

《促织》是一款德式策略竞争游戏。它将玩家带回明朝宣德年间，皇室里盛行名为促织的宫廷娱乐（斗蛐蛐）。内阁每年都要向年间征收，彼时将军趴在地上喊着蛐蛐的名号，商人顾着鉴赏罐子，农民忙着收割粮食时还不忘带些斗蛐蛐用的狗尾草；而玩家将要扮演各乡县官手下的里正，在这个被皇帝兴趣影响社稷的年代，找到自己安身立命的方法，也给自己找到乐子。

—description from the publisher (Chinese)

boardgame: 印象牌：文艺巨匠 (Impression: Literary and Artistic Masters)
description:
Lu Xun, Vincent van Gogh, Ludwig van Beethoven... What impressions do you have of these masters of literature and art? Gather your friends and family for a thrilling battle of memory and dexterity!
In the midst of joyous gameplay, get up close and personal with these masters while easily grasping knowledge!

"Impression Cards: Masters of Literature and Art" is an easy-to=learn, memory, action trivia game. In this game, players need to familiarize themselves with various world-renowned figures (such as Lu Xun, Vincent van Gogh, Ludwig van Beethoven, and more) by memorizing and answering questions about their names, professions, representative works, famous quotes, and more to earn points. At the end of the game, the player with the highest score will emerge victorious.


Impression: Literary and Artistic Masters is a light tabletop party game of memory and reaction that can be played by multiple people. In the game, players need to learn about many world-famous writers or artists (such as Lu Xun, Van Gogh, Beethoven, etc.), and get points by memorizing and answering their names, occupations, representative works, famous quotes, etc. At the end of the game, the player with the highest score will win the game.

—description from the publisher

《印象牌·文艺巨匠》是一款可多人参与的记忆与反应类轻度桌面聚会游戏。在游戏中，玩家需要了解诸多世界名家（如鲁迅、梵高、贝多芬等）的相关信息，通过记忆并抢答他们的姓名、职业、代表作品、名人名言等来获取分数。在游戏结束时，分数最高的玩家将会获得游戏胜利。

—description from the publisher (Chinese)

Colour Scapes is an addictive easy to learn and hard to master tile-placing game suitable for 5+ whilst also being great fun to play in the pub with mates or at your game night. Players take it in turns drawing a tile from the bag and deciding whether to play it on their grid or on the grid of an opponent. The aim of the game is to have the most of your colour on your own grid, with bonus points available for columns and/or rows of your colour and/or being the first to complete your grid.

Colour Scapes can be played in solo mode or up to four players competing to get the most of their colour on their grid whilst also competing for Bonus Points for going out first and for completing colours and/or rows of their colour.

Each tile is comprised of a combination of one or more of red, green, yellow or blue in quadrants with black quadrants being the hero of the hour and are able to be played as any colour.

That’s it, that’s all you need to know to play Colour Scapes. What takes a little longer to learn is how to play Colour Scapes well. Do you play this tile to score some easy points or do you interfere with the column that your opponent is dangerously close to completing? Do you risk creating a ‘dead space’ with this black tile just for the chance to get a little closer to finishing first? Try it and find your own way to play.

—description from the publisher

Taxic- the toxic taxi game! "Pick-Up & Deliver" for up to 4 players in a city with interlocked traffic signals and a special gimmick: Keep the balance between stressful situations (traffic, red lights, police, rival taxis) and the most free route. Deliver the passengers faster than the competitors! The more angry your taxi driver is, the rather she or he is ready to disobey the traffic rules! Use the special abilities of your crazy driver and taxi company!

—description from the designer

In this Wild West game, players play as bandits or Indians, boarding the train.

The train is a 3D wooden component and red and white wooden peices represent the bandits and indians. Card play controls people jumping on board the locamotive and jumping from carriage to carriage.

End game points are determined by majority in each carriage.

The Infiltrator’s special abilities open up new tactical possibilities in the world of Under our Sun. She can move undetected among enemies and ambush others unexpectedly.

In addition to the detailed miniature, the Infiltrator Character Expansion contains everything needed to play this character.

—description from the publisher

With the Technician's special abilities, even more possibilities are added to the world of Under our Sun. His balanced attributes make him skilled in all areas, and he is the only character who can break down items into their resources without the help of a merchant.

In addition to the detailed miniature, the Technician character expansion contains everything you need to play this character.

—description from the publisher

Shrapnel: The Official BattleTech Magazine is your spotlight for tales of brutal, one-on-one BattleMech action in the no-holds-barred gladiatorial arenas of the 31st century and beyond!

A patsy expected to take a fall must utilize every asset at his disposal to avoid becoming another Solaris tragedy when backroom intrigue spills into the arena. A law enforcement agent with ties to organized crime must fight an unsanctioned duel to help stage a daring rescue. Coming out of retirement, a washed-up has-been with an abysmal win-loss record seeks one last bout for a final chance at glory.

In this issue, you’ll begin your journey on the Game World of Solaris VII, where two gladiators must take dangerous risks for a shot at revenge in the name of the Federated Suns. You’ll witness a debt-collection attempt gone wrong, where survival is more valuable than seizing a ’Mech as collateral. And you’ll blast your way into the first installment of the serial novel Violent Inception, by Russell Zimmerman.

Whether you begin in unranked matches in the Reaches, or you’ve worked your way up to the famed Class Six arenas, Solaris is where legends are made and fortunes come to an abrupt end. And the best way to climb the ladder to become the Grand Champion is to arm yourself with advice on survival and ’Mech-scale melee weapons, Stable Digests, technical readouts, and more—all by defending-champion BattleTech authors and some new challengers in the arena!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: End of the Line: Post-Apocalyptic Family Survival
description:
Outlast your neighbors as you send your nuclear family out to collect vital resources in the ruined world. Simultaneous play, deadly drafting, light programming and dark humor combine to form a Rube Goldberg Machine of DOOOOOOM.

The new edition is quicker to learn, just as dangerous, and updated with more pop-cultural references and new game mechanics. Without the ability to directly target your adversaries, this is a passive-aggressive interpretation of “take that.” You must survive every kind of awful that you'd inflict on others.

Welcome to the End times! Warning: none of you may survive.

—description from the publisher

A 18-card wallet compilation of 3 Button Shy games, delivered at ShyCon Denver 2024:


     Mile High City (9 cards)
     Downhill Drop (4 cards)
     NyteLyfe Solitaire: Old West (5 cards)

Hiking is good for your body, but it's also the perfect way to calm your ever-questioning mind.

Mile High City is a trivia game for one or more players. Each round, the players work together to reach a certain number of answers that fit the current card's category within 2 minutes. Successful rounds raise the required number for the next round, while failed rounds decrease the required number. After 6 categories have been completed, players score 1 point for each successful round. Once per game the players may use the Denver card to skip the current round, but doing so raises the stakes: subsequent successful rounds are worth more while failed rounds detract from the final score.


Included in the ShyCon: Denver 2024 wallet compilation.

Everyone is enjoying themselves ice-skating, until Olaf accidentally slips! Will You help him put back together again?

Roll the dice and move your pawn on the board.
With special spaces you acquire puzzle-pieces of Olaf or steal these from opponent. Who gets all 5 pieces together first wins the game.

From the top of the mountain, everything looks small. Hit the slopes as hard as you can without wiping out!

In this dexterity game, players take turns as the skier trying to reach the highest score for the round. The other players arrange the remaining cards in a manner of their choice, keeping all icons visible. The player then flips the skier card from above the table to land on the arranged cards. The skier scores positive or negative points for each icon the card is partially covering, then it's time for another skier to hit the slopes. Once all players have had a chance to ski, the player with the highest score for the round is the winner!


Included in the ShyCon: Denver 2024 wallet compilation.

This old west town's seen better days, but locals tell of strange lights on the horizon. Whether you're robbing banks or locked up, keep your partner close and you'll be just dandy.

The Old West version of NyteLyfe Solitaire introduces new Setting cards: Partners (2), Alien, Bank, and Jail cards. The player needs to supply a standard 52-card deck to play.

Each round, the player draws 5 cards, one by one, placing each card underneath a different Setting card. After all 5 cards have been placed, they score the round based on the rules for each Setting. The game ends in a loss when the (easy/medium/hard) lose condition is met or a victory if 50 cards have been played. A score is then determined based on each Setting's unique rules and the cards within their column, with 20 points being a perfect score.


Included in the ShyCon: Denver 2024 wallet compilation.

Hit the Fire Ball Disk and defeat Bowser! Who will win the game? This product comes with collectable Fire Mario and Fire Luigi figures, compatible with other Epoch Games Super Mario toys and family board games!


     Use paddles to hit fire balls.
     Fire at your caharacter's target to advance and attack!
     Play defense by hitting your opponents target to send them back to start.
     The player who hites the tower gets to knock down Bowser!
family: Video Game Theme: Super Mario Bros.

description: With the Air Hockey game you can practice target shooting with just 1 player, or if you prefer, with up to 4 players and compete to see who reaches 15 points first!
family: Video Game Theme: Super Mario Bros.

description:
It all started with a coprolite. The archaeology team began their dig expecting to find fossilized feces, but what they found was so much more! Welcome to Triassic: Search for the Gojirasaur! Players are searching for Eggs, DNA, and so much more in this game of fast play and combos galore. 
In Roll and Write Revolution's newest collaboration, we are joined by Todd and Ashlyn Cuzzort, who helped design the game both mechanically and artistically. Bringing the past to life is no easy feat, but players will find plenty to like here. 
 Rolling the dice each turn represents the research actions that the players will take. Unfortunately, budget cuts take away the highest value dice each turn, sorry, but the university really needs that budget for something else. But your paleontological skills will prevail because you can use two of the remaining dice to do two actions, each die is assigned to one area of the sheet, or both dice can be assigned to the same section. 
The great thing about searching for fossils is that some times you can hit a vein and away you go, finding dozens in one hunt. In Triassic, players will feel that same momentum as they uncover actions from one die that leads to further actions which do not need dice funding, thank you very much university staff.

As the dice help players dig, they will find plenty of challenges when the highest values of dice are removed each turn lessening their options each turn. Playing 1-100 players with players being involved with each roll of the dice will highlight the latest developments in game design with an eye to the future. Players can think of themselves as leading the charge toward developing the theme parks where the mighty thunder lizards will roam again. But first they have to get ready with their research, cloning, and organic materials.

—description from the designer

Embark on an elemental journey with 5 Elements: Genesis, a fast-paced, strategic card game that challenges players to master the forces of nature. Designed for 2-6 players, this game combines tactical decision-making with dynamic gameplay, making each session uniquely challenging and exciting.

In 5 Elements: Genesis, players harness the ancient powers of Earth, Water, Fire, Air, and Spirit, each endowed with unique abilities. Through clever card play and strategic foresight, players must outmaneuver their opponents to control the elements and dominate the game.

Key Features:


     Dynamic Gameplay: Flexibility in action choices allows players to strategize in real-time, adapting to the shifting tides of each player's moves.
     Elemental Card Abilities: Utilize the unique powers of three distinct abilities per element to enhance your strategy and disrupt your opponents.
     Streamlined Game Mechanics: Enjoy quick yet strategic games perfect for both casual game nights and competitive sessions.


—description from the publisher

Try to survive from other players' cards and from the deck many surprises the one who survives the longest win. Use Counter card to counter some effects card. Place risky bets and earn advantageous abilities.

Deal one of each type of attack card (Sword, Axe, and Mace) to each player. Shuffle the Blank, Bomb and Explosion cards and place them on the table to create the Blank deck. Decide who will Start with who has seen an explosion the most recently.
During your turn choose and play one of your three cards, resolving its effect.

When your opponent uses a card effect on you, negate it and make them suffer.

Certain played cards stay on the play area, others go to the attack card used pile.

—description from the designer

For a long time, limited by maritime technology, the old nautical maps have not been updated. The merchants in the kingdom could only rely on luck to travel between the islands. The lack of map information severely hindered the kingdom's commercial development.
Troubled by this, the king finally decided to recruit several wise and courageous captains to create an accurate and reliable new map together. As one of the greatest captains of this era, you meet all the criteria. Go to the notice board at the port, set sail, and achieve glory—your moment is now!
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Learn about Matariki while having fun! This board game set is perfect for family game night. Learn about the 9 stars of Matariki and the history behind them as you make your way around the game board.

—description from the publisher

Jewel Box: Fluttering Expedition expands on your entomological adventure, adding Butterflies to the mix and allowing up to 6 players to play together. These Skippers and Swallowtails will challenge you in new ways...are you ready for the challenge?

—description from the publisher

Pokemon Spin Fighter has players launching spinning Pokemon out of poke-balls into a spinning tops battle!

Players insert their chosen Pokemon top into the poke-ball. Simultaneously, players pull a string to initiate the Pokemon top to spin, then press a button on top of the poke-ball to launch the spinning Pokemon onto the battlefield.

The Pokemon will bounce against each other in a fierce battle until only on Pokemon top remains in motion, becoming the winner.

boardgame: La Fabrique à rêves: Carte Nuit du Jeu de Société
description:
New theme card to add to the game.
French edition of the card found in Plato Magazine 166

In this expansion for Color Koi, your Fish will reproduce, just like they do in the real world. By combining different fish species through crossbreeding, you can generate fish with unique colors. The game sheet features an extra smaller pond, with its own unique plants and special compartments for raising Koi offspring. When you plan what to do in the big pond, you also consider the impact it will have on the little one.

—description from the publisher

Do you know the legend about Dragon Koi? There was one Koi that was jumping for hundreds of years to reach the top of the waterfall. To reward perseverance, this Koi was transformed into a dragon by the gods. In this expansion your Koi will become a huge colorful dragon. It will give you an additional way to score.

—description from the publisher

Ghost Koi are fish with dark husks. In this expansion for Color Koi some of them will appear in your pond. You must stay focused and do not let them ruin your dream pond. Your score will be impacted if there are either too many or too few Ghost Koi, so careful planning is necessary to avoid this. On the game sheet you have a special space to track what colors you use in your pond and when your Ghost Koi will appear.

—description from the publisher

Color Koi: Water Lilly is an expansion for Color Koi that brings more things to think about during the game. It adds one more thing to score. At the start of the game the pond on the sheet will have colorful lilies around it that will give another way to score. It includes game sheet with this mechanic included.

—description from the publisher

Do you want to add more interesting choices and difficulty to Loot and Roll? This expansion features three different types of guardians. After each level, you will have to pay the guardian some treasures to avoid his wrath. If you haven't managed to pay, you will be at a disadvantage. Have you got the courage to fight the giant enemies and have the mint to use them to your advantage?

—description from the publisher

Want to have even more variety in your Loot and Roll adventures? In the Endless Swamps, there is a new type of terrain - one that is hard to cross. Also, there is a new monster foe to fight! One that can really mess up your treasures. Beware of your steps, and face the danger!

—description from the publisher
family: Theme: Wetlands / Swamps / Bogs / Fens / Marshland

description:
Come to the Artic Cold Land. An ice-cold expansion for the loot and roll game where there are lots of really slippery terrains, and the new monster appears! One that swaps your treasures at his will.

—description from the publisher

Come to the Deadly Desert in this Loot and Roll expansion. Beware of the deadly moving sands and face the new monster type. It will try to take the treasure you own and swap it for another one.

—description from the publisher

Hard Level is print and play board game where you control your character in a stage like in console or pc platform game. You will try to push through enemies and traps and get to exit while trying to complete objective of the level.

Additional episode to play. In Goblin Alliance you have to defeat a goblin army led by Raxar. Capture a stronghold that was unjustly captured by him and rescue prisoners from their cells.

This episode contains five levels you can play. Each of them can be played separately or you can play them as a whole big adventure. Each level has its own challenges and goals.

—description from the publisher

Hard Level is print and play board game where you control your character in a stage like in console or pc platform game. You will try to push through enemies and traps and get to exit while trying to complete objective of the level.

Additional episode to play. Mother Nature has been kidnapped. Go on the rescue mission. But beware of elemental powers that decided to rebel. They are extremely dangerous and unpredictable.

This episode contains five levels you can play. Each of them can be played separately or you can play them as a whole big adventure. Each level has its own challenges and goals.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Hard Level: the Curse of Pharaoh
description:
Hard Level is print and play board game where you control your character in a stage like in console or pc platform game. You will try to push through enemies and traps and get to exit while trying to complete objective of the level.

Additional episode to play. In the Curse of the Pharaoh you have to explore ruins created millennia ago in search of relics of the past and treasures hoarded by our ancestors. Be careful as remnants of ancient curse still linger around.

This episode contains five levels you can play. Each of them can be played separately or you can play them as a whole big adventure. Each level has its own challenges and goals.

—description from the publisher

Hard Level is print and play board game where you control your character in a stage like in console or pc platform game. You will try to push through enemies and traps and get to exit while trying to complete objective of the level.

Additional episode to play. In Tower of Doom you will climb up a tower guarded by mechanical knights. Your goal is to find a treasure that contains valuables gathered by legendary scientist that hoarded all his wealth for many decades but recently passed away.

This episode contains three levels you can play. Each of them can be played separately or you can play them as a whole big adventure. Each level has its own challenges and goals. Additionally this episode brings new character to play: Thief. You can use him in any episode of Hard Level.

—description from the publisher

Hard Level is print and play board game where you control your character in a stage like in console or pc platform game. You will try to push through enemies and traps and get to exit while trying to complete objective of the level.

Hard Level: One shots offers 2 new levels.
Green Plague where your goal will be to get supplies needed for survival of your group, that got stuck between a horde of zombies.
Deep Jungle where you need to get Eggs protected by Gnolls and defeat an angry Ent that endangers
whole forest.

—description from the publisher

Dice Raiders: Secrets of Aztecs is a standalone game from the Dice Raiders series. You, alongside your fellow adventurers, will come to Mexico to unveil the secrets of the Aztec calendar.

Step into the shoes of a fearless adventurer, following in the footsteps of archeology heroes like Jones and Croft! In this game, you are one of the on a quest to solve the mystery of the Aztecs calendar. You will need to use your strategic thinking to overcome obstacles and challenges. The calendar contains various puzzles that you will try to solve in a better way than your rivals.

Dice Raiders is a Roll and Write Print and Play game. Each round, you will roll the dice and decide what puzzle you will try to tackle. Each of them will give you points in a different way, so you need to decide ahead what you will be focusing on. However, you must adapt to the movements of your opponents, as they can undermine your plan. You want to be the most clever one among the fellow explorers.

Game is prepared for 1 to 4 players in mind, and is great for each number of players. Solitaire mode has special “Independant Explorer” mechanics that will give you the challenge to beat the game. On average, players can expect to spend around 20-30 minutes playing the game.

With its engaging gameplay, unique mechanics, and immersive theme, Dice Riders is a game series that will keep you coming back for more. So play the game and explore these amazing places.

Dice Raiders: Vikings Crusade is a standalone adventure in the Dice Raiders series. Embark on a thrilling journey to the northern sea, where a mysterious drakkar has emerged. You and your fellow adventurers are called to uncover its secrets! Step into the shoes of a fearless adventurer, following in the footsteps of archeology heroes like Jones and Croft! In this saga, you are part of an elite league of adventurers. In Vikings Crusade you have a daring mission to decipher the riddles hidden in the drakkar. Your strategic insight will be your greatest ally as you navigate through a series of challenges and puzzles.

Dice Raiders is a Roll and Write Print and Play game. Each round, you will roll the dice and decide what puzzle you will try to tackle. Each of them will give you points in a different way, so you need to decide ahead what you will be focusing on. However, you must adapt to the movements of your opponents, as they can undermine your plan. You want to be the most clever one among the fellow explorers.

Game is prepared for 1 to 4 players in mind, and is great for each number of players. Solitaire mode has special “Independant Explorer” mechanics that will give you the challenge to beat the game. On average, players can expect to spend around 20-30 minutes playing the game.

—description from the publisher

In My Little Koi, you can immerse yourself in the beauty of Koi fish by designing the most stunning pond imaginable.  This is simplified version of the Color Koi board game, adapted for younger players. The Pond has been enlarged to make coloring easier for the kids. It is a fully fledged game that doesn’t require Color Koi to be played.
family: Versions & Editions: Junior Versions of Grown-Up Games

boardgame: Roll and Rails: South Africa – Madagascar
description: Expand your game experience by getting additional Map pack for Roll and Rails.

boardgame: Roll and Rails: Scandinavia Map Pack
description:
Scandinavia Map Expansion for Roll and Rails game.

Contains: Scandinavia map for multiplayer game.

In  Gnome's Garden you will become a gnome farmer that was given a task to  feed whole gnome village. Thanks to this expansion you will get two new garden sheets to play. But instead of vegetables you will plant fruit trees. This expansion brings new mechanic to the game. You will not only plant your trees you will also make tasty jam for your fellow gnomes. making delicous jam will bring you more points. Let's try this fruity expansion.

In Gnome's Garden you will become a gnome farmer that was given a task to feed whole gnome village. Thanks to this expansion you will get two new garden sheets to play. But instead of vegetables you will plant flowers for the bees. This expansion brings new mechanic to the game. You will not only plant flowers you will also try to satisfy bees. All we know that bees need flowers to make tasty honey. Try to plant as many different flowers as possible to score more points.

In  Gnome's Garden you will become a gnome farmer that was given a task to  feed whole gnome village. Thanks to this expansion you will get two new garden sheets to play. But instead of vegetables you will plant mushrooms. This expansion brings new mechanic to the game. You will not only plant mushrooms you will also make tasty mushroom soup for your fellow gnomes. The better soup the more points you will earn.

This small expansion gives you opportunity to add some complexity to the Gnome's Garden game. At the beginning of the game all players will randomly choose one of the nine garden plans to follow. Game flows exactly the same way but you can score more points if your garden will meet requirements of the plan.

This expansion works with: Gnome's Garden - base game, Gnome's Garden - Orchard, Gnome's Garden - Beekeepers and Gnome's Garden - Mushrooms.

This small expansion gives you opportunity to add some complexity to the Gnome's Garden game. During the game you will try to make healthy and fresh vegetable salads from your own garden. Every time you plant a veggie you can add it to the chosen salad. Finish as many salads as possible to score big.

More Constructions consist of two expansions for Town Constructor that can be combined together:

Mayor's Wisdom  - In this expansion Mayor gives you guidelines they want to be fulfilled in your town. You get a list of 18 tasks that you have to compete for with other players. It gives you a new scoring opportunity. In consist of additional game sheet.

Additional buildings - In this expansion, you receive additional game sheet with 3 additional Special Buildings sets. That may be used during the game instead of ones from base game. It gives more variety to your games.

Easier version of the game of Town Constructor. Designed to play with families and kids. It is also a great way to introduce new players to the mechanic.

Town Constructor Junior is a quicker version, with simpler scoring rules. Additionally, in this variant, there is much less penalty when you don’t manage to optimize your moves correctly. It’s a great way to just have fun with your family.
family: Versions & Editions: Junior Versions of Grown-Up Games

description: This expansion to Town Constructor will give you game sheet with an additional way of scoring. The city will be now divided into 9 2x2 zones. Multiple schemes are available to choose before the game. You or your enemies will decide which ones will be in the game. If you manage to fulfill them, you get extra points.

This expansion to Town Constructor brings the market to next level. You will gain additional game sheet with shared estate market. You must now control not only your private market but there are also changes in the global one. This adds an additional mechanic layer to control, and allows for more interaction between players.

This expansion to Town Constructor gives you new game sheet, with new things to control. In addition to building a city, you have progress bars like comfort, finances, and ecology. Everytime you build a building you influence some bars. For example when you build a Factory, finances will increase, but the comfort of living in your town will decrease. You need to manage the levels of these factors so that they are as balanced as possible.

Frightening Arachnids - guardians of their planet, emerge from their subterranean lairs. Fight with frightening formidable creatures to capture the planet's valuable secrets.

Arachnid War is an expansion for Beyond the Horizon which introduces a totally new planet map with additional mechanics of soldiers and monsters on the planet. It contains new dedicated player camps sheet and Arachnia planet game sheet.

Arachnids will make your Space Crew Members' life more difficult. On each of the Research Zones there is a monster that can be defeated to make excavation of samples easier. It is really hard to acquire research samples without defeating Arachnid. On each round you send soldiers to fight with the threat. You'll earn extra victory points for defeating monsters and clearing the way for the scientist to get those hard to get samples.

A two-player (or -team) game about words.
You each make a five-letter word, and the other player then tries to guess it. For each guess, the guesser will be told which letters are wrong, which are correct but in wrong places, and which are correct and in the correct places.
The first to guess the opponent's word wins.

The mission is clear - explore the Verdant Eden planet and prepare to pave the way for humanity’s next chapter constructing buildings for the new colony.

New Colony is an expansion for Beyond the Horizon which introduces a totally new planet map and additional mechanics of constructing buildings on a new planet for the new colonists. Depending on players' involvement, they will receive points at the end of the game. Try to contribute a lot to building a new human settlement to get a high score.

An interactive crime/thriller experience for friends & foes!

Sicily 1984: The Maifa family Di Salvo invites friends and family to a party on their estate to decide on a possible successor. But then the head of the family, Francesco, is found dead in his private rooms.

Can you find out what happened? And can you solve the murder case?

As a host, you invite your guests to a dinner, during which you solve a mysterious death. But be careful: one of you is the murderer! In order to solve the case, you have to uncover shady machinations and dark secrets as well as carefully challenge the other players. This is the only way to solve the crime!

—description from the publisher

Here you have a set of small modules that you can add to your game. You can play with all of them or with any combination of them. Adding them gives you more options during the game, while usually it extends gameplay time a little. The modules are: Secret Agenda, Engineering Bay, New Alliance and Planetary Incidents.

Secret Agenda - Mission objective cards that adds new way to score and are hidden from your rivals.

Engineering Bay - New place for player camp - in Engineering Bay, players may rebuild their equipment for other types of equipment pieces or for further research.

New Alliance - New technology three for your player camp, which will give you opportunity to gain additional points directly by using it.

Planetary Incidents - Cosmic events cards. Each round players will draw a new event card. Players will have to overcome various struggling during the game, or use the beneficial situation to their advantage.

Explore the new planet's vast potential for scientific research. Develop the Research Facility and enhance its capabilities. All players will share it and will grant you amazing powers.

Science Facility is an expansion for Beyond the Horizon which introduces a totally new planet map of Innovaris and new Science Facility sheet.

This Science Facility is used and developed by all the players, so each round you will have the opportunity to use some of its powers. Always remember that with each technology you choose to use, you pave the way to unlock other improvements for your opponents, so it's not an easy choice.

The Science Facility sheet from this expansion is compatible with the Zay Delia map from the base game, and the Innovaris planet can be played with addition of this Science Facility  sheet as well as with only the rules from the base game.

Baby Animals is a standalone version of Wildlife Dice with easier to manage Habitats and scoring mechanisms.

Step into the shoes of a park ranger. Create a home for many wild baby animals. Plant various trees, place lakes and meadows, to create suitable environment for every species of wildlife to live in. Invite baby animals to habitats you created - the greater the diversity of your park, the higher your point total will be.

Roly is an imaginative storytelling game that sparks creativity and improvisation. Players combine character, location, and situation cards to craft unique stories. Each game is different, keeping the experience fresh and exciting every time. Its portable, pocket-sized design allows you to play anywhere. The game's main goal is to enhance creativity and social interaction while having fun together.

—description from the designer

Tatra Park is an expansion for Wildlife Dice with a totally new set of animals with new sets of habitats you will use. This addon have the same mechanic as the Bialowieza Park base game.

Tatra National Park is a natural wonderland located in southern Poland. The diverse range of flora and fauna found in this place includes majestic brown bears, gray wolves, European otters, and White-tailed Eagles. The Tatra Mountains, part of the Carpathian Mountain range, boast the highest peak, Rysy, which stands at an impressive elevation of 2,499 meters(8199 feet). In addition to its other attractions, the park boasts over 650 caves, with the Wielka Sniezna Cave standing out as the deepest and longest in Poland. Among the many waterfalls in the area, the most impressive one is the Wielka Silkawa, standing at approximately 70 meters(300 feet) tall.

Dino Park is an expansion for Wildlife Dice in which you will prepare a unique Dinosaur Park and invite tourists there. This expansion adds a fresh set of animals and new habitats. The mechanic of tourists adds a little of freshness to the game.

Welcome to Wildlife Dice: Dinosaurs. The thrilling experience of a lifetime to tourists visiting here. Home to various species of dinosaurs, including the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Triceratops, Diplodocus and Pterodactyl. Tourists coming here can even visit other dinosaur parks in the future if they survive the first visit! In other words visiting the park can be the experience of a lifetime!

Serengeti Park is an expansion for Wildlife Dice in which you will design Serengeti Park and prepare the route for a Photo Safari trip for the tourist to enjoy your wildlife paradise. This expansion gives you a fresh set of animals and new habitats. The mechanic of Photo Safari is a great addition for more experienced players. Alongside creating terrains for animal habitats, you must mark out the next spot of the route your tourists will take.

Serengeti National Park, with its vast expanse, is noted as one of the largest and oldest ecosystems on the planet. In the vast expanse of the Serengeti, one can encounter a remarkable variety of large mammals, such as the African elephant, black rhinoceros, Cape buffalo, lion, and Masai giraffe. The environment is believed to have remained unchanged for over a million years. The park is home to the Maasai people. They have lived in the area for over 300 years. The Maasai people continue to inhabit the land and spearhead the conservation of the park.

Great Barrier Reef is an expansion for Wildlife Dice in which you will create your Great Barrier Reef region.

There is a twist in the game mechanic. In other games from the Wildlife Dice family many animals can share the same region. In this one hoverer animals terrain used by one animal cannot be used by another one.

Yellowstone Park is an expansion to Wildlife Dice that is a one sheet game. It is prepared for 2 to 4 players.

The map is shared between players so they can interfere with the plans of others, and even use their animals to gain points for their own terrains. There are many changes in mechanics compared to other versions of the game. Moreover, the geysers - one of the hallmarks of Yellowstone Park - are also included there!

You want to increase the fun in your next rolling tour cargo delivery - here's a cool new unique maps for you. With this map, you will discover new regions of Great Britain and carry region-specific resources.

You want to increase the fun in your next rolling tour cargo delivery - here's a cool new unique maps for you. With this map, you will discover new regions of United States and carry region-specific resources.

You want to increase the fun in your next rolling tour cargo delivery - here's a cool new unique maps for you. With this map, you will discover new regions of Germany and carry region-specific resources.

Contracts is an optional module that enhances gameplay by adding additional challenges that give points to players. Those challenges give players additional tasks to keep track of and diversify their playstyle, while maintaining competition for their quick completion.

Are your trains ready for some fun trip to France? You will visit various cities, from Marseille to the Paris! There is also a new resource, never seen before on Rolling Trains the maps, and it is - you probably guessed it - wine! One of the things strongly associated with France. Warm up the engines of your trains and place your railroads on new lands!

Get ready for an exciting adventure in Brazil, the land of samba, soccer, and sunshine! Lead your trains across this vast and diverse country, from Rio de Janeiro to Brasilia! Crude oil is a precious resource there that can boost your points, but it will also attract your rivals. Can you master the art of transportation and become the most respected train operator in Brazil?

Embark on a captivating train journey through Morocco, the gem of North Africa! Pass through the vibrant landscapes, from the coastal charm of Casablanca to the bustling markets of Marrakech. Precious gold is your ticket to prosperity, enhancing your trade routes and attracting competitors. Will you outmaneuver your rivals and establish yourself as the premier merchant of Morocco? The challenge awaits in the kingdom where tradition meets modernity. Laid the tracks, the journey begins!

Prepare your trains for a magnificent sun-drenched landscape journey on the railroads of Spain. Traverse from the historic walls of Madrid, hear the vibrant flamenco rhythms of Seville and travel near to the busy streets of Barcelona. Feel the rich culture and diverse geography as you strategize your way to victory. Iron is the most valuable thing to deliver here, so prepare your wagons for some heavy load! All aboard for an unforgettable adventure!

Embark on a thrilling tour across the vast and varied terrain of Australia with your trains. Your adventure begins beneath the twinkling Southern Cross, guiding you through the red sands of the Outback, the tropical rainforests of Queensland, and the rugged coastlines of the Great Australian Bight. In this land where Iron is king, load your carriages with the precious metal and navigate the railroads. Dodge the wild kangaroos as you lay down tracks, and be the first to connect the bustling cities from Canberra on the West to the mining towns of Eastern Australia. All aboard for a journey where strategy, luck, and a bit of Aussie charm will lead you to victory!

Dreamscape Kingdoms: Dream Essence is an Expansion of Dreamscape Kingdoms. It adds a new Eternal Lands map with a twist to the mechanics. You will acquire essence that will help you to acquire various skills that you can use in your game. It means at the same time as you try to gain influence over the kingdom, you want to acquire the right essences to gain skills and use them at the right time. It adds an additional layer of complexity to the game.

Dreamscape Kingdoms: Moon Cards is an expansion for Dreamscape Kingdoms. It adds 9 special cards with additional scoring rules. They will give you an additional score depending on various ways of minion scattering. It works with the base game and all other add-ons. Moon Cards can be even mixed with Dream Cards from another expansion.

Dreamscape Kingdoms: Lunaria is an expansion for Dreamscape Kingdoms. It adds a new map with a twist to the mechanics. There are magical places all across the map and on each of the crossroads. So at the same time as you want to gain influence over the kingdom, you try to acquire the right crossroads and right magical places from the map. It adds an additional layer of complexity to the game.

A drafting and collection game with extremely simple rules.
Embark on a journey to conquer the Wild West!
Meet the infamous outlaws of the 19th century and make your mark among these notorious gangsters.
Assess every situation, control your luck, and be ruthless with your opponents!

The Wild West, unexplored arid lands, adventure around every canyon, a tough yet simple life, accompanied by your faithful steed, heading towards the setting sun... It all sounds great, but you still need to earn your keep and enough to buy one or two shots of booze at the saloon! Work? Are you kidding me? You don't want a life of hard labor toiling on a dry and barren land. You want to carve your name into the history books! And what better way to do that than to become an outlaw, like Jesse James, Billy The Kid, or Calamity Jane? And not just any outlaw... Public Enemy Number One!

Travel from town to town to meet the most famous criminals of the Wild West! Evade law enforcement. Dodge the relentless hitmen that your opponents, also eager for fame, send after you. Use Swindlers to corrupt their minions and increase your influence. And finally, with cunning, audacity, and a bit of luck, become the most renowned outlaw the West has ever known!

—description from the publisher

A drafting and combinations game with extremely simple rules.
Evaluate the potential of the draw, choose a card to define your priority, and pick the PLUSH that will lead you to victory!
Free the PLUSHIES trapped into the Claw Machine!
Position yourself to play before your opponents so that you can choose the PLUSH you covet before they do.

—description from the publisher

A game where the players take turns being "the single" who will be presented with potential matches by the other players.
Each of the "non-single" players choose two cards from their hand to construct a perfect person for "the single" to match.
The card combinations are read out, and then the "non-singles" get to play one more card on one of the persons, so that each potential match now has two good traits and one bad trait.
"The single" now chooses a match, and the player who proposed the match gets a point.
In the next round, the next player clockwise gets to be "the single".
Game ends when someone has five points.

The whole universe seems to be under the attack of a mysterious menace. All Time and Space may be at great risk. Shifters have to form a team and travel from world to world and age to age to identify the problem... And deal with it as permanently as possible!
 Shifters is a solo game or a cooperative 2-player game. You will play a campaign, choosing your way among various scenarios. Each and every time you arrive on a new planet, you'll send your team to fight against local opponents, having to adapt to their particularities. You might fail this hard mission... But a "Die and Retry" mechanism will allow you to start over and over again, becoming stronger every time, until you totally succeed!
Beside the "Rogue-Lite" aspect, Shifters is a card game with an innovative "Shift" mechanism: timing will be very important to trigger your card effects efficiently. Place them on a line, and they will move one space at a time each turn. Craft the board so each slot triggers different effects the way you want. When a card arrives at the end of the line, it will also trigger special effects. 
Handle the timing of how you place your cards and when to get them back in your hand to destroy every enemy in the current area. Then you'll move on to the next one.
 Good luck Shifters: Universe is counting on you!

—description from the publisher

From Manga to Sushi, from Samurai to Sumo Wrestlers, this is the game where you test your knowledge of Japanese culture. Using chopsticks, choose a Sushi Roll tile, answer correctly the corresponding question to conquer it.

This is card driven historical game where players compete to be the most important and successful civil rights group in the early 1960s. This game is a complete revision of the first edition with new mechanics, art, and rules. It is designed for up to 4 players and includes a variant for solitaire play.
The game lasts three turns. Players select one of four organizations: SNCC, CORE, SCLC or NAACP. The mechanics involve card play, cube placement and collection, and conflict resolution through rolling dice.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Oopsie is a brilliantly chaotic party card game that's quick to learn and quick to mess up. You’ll face a flow of bizarre rules that lead everyone to act ridiculously. Remember your own rules and pay attention. The aim is to be the first to call out others when they make mistakes. 
Can you keep up?

When it’s your turn, draw a card and read the rule out loud. Then place it in your card holder, facing away from you. The rule is now in effect, and only the other players are allowed to look at it. You must remember and follow the rule until you, or another player, wins the card.

You win others' cards by being the first to call out "Oopsie!" when you catch them breaking their rule. You can win your own card if you manage to exceed the maximum of five rules at a time. The player who wins the most cards wins the game.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Scarlet Envelope XI: Time Trap Island
description:
Welcome to Time Trap Island, where reality is twisted and the very fabric of the universe is messed up. Formerly the base of a secretive Red Letter Corp., the Island is now a playground of dangerous anomalies. What kind of Interdimensional Science Project went wrong here? And what do you have to do to ESCAPE?

—description from the publisher

Of Partnerships, Tricks, and Usurpations. The royal court has assembled and two rival partnerships square off in a contest of wits and cunning as they vie for their place in courtly proceedings.

Trounce is a partnership trick-taking games based on the traditional card game Euchre but reimagined for the six-suited Decktet. Partnerships compete over a series of deals to both win the most tricks and win the most cards of a bonus scoring suit. Partnerships must make a calculated gamble on what suits to order up for the trump and bonus suit, for if they fail to meet the objectives they will be usurped by their opponents! Crown cards may give you the upper hand in winning a trick, but be wary of other Crowns, which can Trounce a previously played Crown and steal away your victory!

Trounce requires a set of Decktet cards to play.  The game is tended for four players (in two partnerships), but has variants for 2- and 3-player modes.

—description from the designer

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Candy Boost Pack
description:
This pack contains the following:


     12 New Market cards: 3 new and exclusive Market cards for each of the four Markets in the Core Game, to increase the variety of your games!
     12 Leader Rings: miniatures of D.E.I. faction Leaders can be placed in these semi-transparent plastic rings so they can be easily identified on the game map!
     10 Faction Reference Sheets: these handy sheets contain the rules of every single Faction currently available. They will be very useful for keeping the rules of the faction you are playing at hand at all times, without the need to consult the rulebooks.

Дюжина королевы ("Queen of 12") is a board game in which players have to predict the plans of their opponents, grab as many magic crystals as possible using cards of their subjects and skillfully distribute the values obtained on their playing field.

The goal of the game is to fill the squares of your playing board so as to earn as many victory points as possible. Players need as many magical crystals as they can, which can be gained by playing a card from their hand. Opponents also lay out cards, and only the most skilled player will be able to use the cards so that most dice are in their favor.

Players can change the starting set of characters with a large number of cards, offering new challenges and tactics.

Each round, the players follow this sequence of actions:

     The active player rolls the dice into the "jungle" and "mountains" - the lid and the bottom of the box.
     All players choose a character card from their hand and place it face down.
     Players open their cards simultaneously. If the cards match, they cancel each other and do not apply their effects. The remaining cards are played one by one, depending on the strength of a particular character. Using the effects of cards, players take dice for themselves.
     Based on the value or color of dice received, players mark their kingdom maps. They can also use useful bonuses. The aim of players is to complete as many rows and columns of their kingdom map.


The game lasts 12 rounds, after which players count winning points. The winner is the player with the most points.

This edition comes in a box with the Queen of 12: Crusade expansion, which includes an extra game notebook with new rules for completing the kingdom map. And three promo cards are also included.

•••
«Дюжина королевы» — настольная игра, в которой вам предстоит предугадывать планы соперников, захватывать как можно больше магических кристаллов, используя карты ваших подданных и умело распределять полученные значения на своём игровом поле. Вас ждёт отличное сочетание механик блефа, одновременного розыгрыша карт персонажей и классического ролл-н-райта.

Цель игры - заполнить ячейки своего игрового поля так, чтобы набрать как можно больше победных очков. Для этого игрокам понадобится как можно больше магических кристаллов, которые можно получить, сыграв карту персонажа из руки. Однако соперники тоже выкладывают свои карты, и только самый проницательный игрок сможет разыграть персонажей так, чтобы большая часть кубиков досталась именно ему. Большое количество карт позволяют изменять стартовые наборы персонажей, предлагая игрокам новые испытания и новые тактики.

Каждый раунд игроки выполняют следующую последовательность действий:

     Активный игрок бросает кубики в «джунгли» и «горы» — крышку и дно коробки.
     Все игроки выбирают по 1 карте персонажа из своей руки и выкладывают её лицом вниз.
     Игроки одновременно открывают свои карты. Если карты игроков совпали, они отменяют друг друга без применения их эффекта. Остальные карты разыгрываются по очереди, в зависимости от скорости того или иного персонажа. Применяя эффекты карт, игроки забирают кубики себе.
     Используя значение или цвет полученных кубиков, игроки делают отметки на своих картах королевств. А также они могут воспользоваться полезными бонусами. Цель игроков - заполнить как можно больше рядов и столбцов на своей карте королевства.


Игра длится 12 раундов, после чего игроки подсчитывают победные очки. Игрок, набравший наибольшее количество очков, становится победителем.

Игра выходит в одной коробке с дополнением «Крестовый поход», включающим дополнительный игровой блокнот с новыми правилами заполнения карты королевства. Так же в российское издание включены и 3 промокарты: Шпион, Коллекционер и Генерал.
family: Components: Game Box Used In Play

description:
Smash opposing jousting halflings from their ponies in this tabletop miniature game.

For each Tilt a player will choose a Knight from their team. They will then assign dice amongst the three attributes to try to remove or dismount their opponent, while trying to prevent the same from happening to them. The use of Ploy cards can be used to buff your Knight, hinder the opposition, or even call the Tilt over. Each Knight also has one or more Traits that are used during a Tilt.

The Game of Switchboard is a compelling mix of chaos, strategy and convenient alliances. Switchboard is as complex as you want it to be, and as simple as you need it to be, entertaining both hardcore and casual gamers alike. Through the integration of new board mechanics, Switchboard provides a modern twist on pachisi style games; it’s a fast paced race-to-the-finish on an ever changing board.

The object of the game is to get all your pawns onto the board, around the board, and home before everyone else, but the Action Cards are what really set Switchboard apart. Action Cards allow players to switch and move every part of the board. Players may choose to use the cards offensively or defensively, developing their strategy for winning and obstructing the efforts of the other players. No pawn is truly safe until it reaches the Home Tile, with players banding together in Convenient Alliances to stop a common enemy, but turning upon each other the moment the situation changes, creating a fun, chaotic race to the finish.

Switchboard is also innovative in its board layout, changing shape to accommodate two to eight players, with two playing on a rectangle, three on a triangle, four on a square, etc.

In addition to the standard, free-for-all format, players have the option of playing in a team format, using the cards to propel the entire team to victory and cooperating to thwart the efforts of the other team(s).

—description from the designer

Vienna, 1683. The Ottoman Turks have led an enormous army north to add Austria to its empire with its capital of Vienna, which controls the rich Danube River trade. The defenders have valiantly held out and are close to collapse. But, a joint Polish, Austrian, and German relief army is on the way. The Turks are prepared to crush these fools who dare challenge them.

The game takes about 90 minutes to play. One player commands the Allied forces of Austrian, German, and Polish troops, and the other player commands the Turkish forces besieging Vienna. Cards vary game play.

—description from the publisher

1844. The Moroccan Sultan has given refuge to Abdel Kader, the charasmatic leader of a revolt against the French who have taken control and imposed a colonial government over much of Algeria. The Moroccans have raised a large army under the command of the sultan's son to crush the invaders. The French are led by the competent leader Marshal Bugeaud who has devised novel tactics to counter the Moroccan superiority in troops and boldly advances into Morocco.

The Battle of Isly is a low to moderate complexity tactical game on Marshal Bugeaud's campaign against the Moroccans and attempt to capture Abd el Kader. The game takes about 90 minutes to play. One player commands the French forces and the other player commands the Moroccan forces. 
Cards vary game play.

—description from the publisher

Upgrade your Tome collection with 3 new Elements. Includes 6 Basic Sleep spells, 6 Basic Poison spells, and 6 Special Sound Spells.

Tome is a twist on the classic formula. It's simple enough to pick up for a new player, but has a deep layer of strategy that will keep veterans coming back again and again.

The Sound Codex is sure to bring you the magical encore of the century!

—description from the publisher

Upgrade your Tome collection with 3 new Elements. Includes 6 Basic Charm spells, 6 Basic Berserk spells, and 6 Special Silver Spells.

Tome is a twist on the classic trick-taking formula. It's simple enough to pick up for a new player, but has a deep layer of strategy that will keep veterans coming back again and again.

An Element as pure and true as moonlight, glistening with the power to repel the wicked beast that stalked us in the dark. A metal that can hold back the night, and the terrors that come with it. When all seems lost, let it be your final bullet.

Silver games tend to be lightning fast, a great way to play a speed round!

—description from the publisher

Artistic skills come into play and are put to the test in The Arts of Insanity. It’s the newest filthy adult party game truly in a category of its own. Character and action cards merge together and form hilarious combinations which players then must get their teammates to guess. The tricky part? Players can only describe, act, draw, or mime the scenarios for their teammates. The more difficult the method, the more points a team will get. It’s hours of endless fun.

In this expansion to Iron Made you will produce eco-paper. Take two resources - fresh wood from sawmills and waste paper to make fresh paper. This change to the mechanic will make Iron Made even more interesting. This expansion will give you also 3 different new maps that are compatible with all other versions of Iron Made. One map from quick play, one standard size and one large.

In this expansion to Iron Made you will produce yogurt and cheese from the milk, and transport them to the shops. Balance the production in the best way possible, because it will give you additional points. This expansion will give you also 3 different new maps that are compatible with all other versions of Iron Made. One map from quick play, one standard size and one large.

In this expansion to Iron Made you will use three types of energy production: from solar panels, hydro power plants and wind farms to deliver power to the various cities with different needs. Make the balanced production of various sources to gain additional points. This expansion will give you also 3 different new maps that are compatible with all other versions of Iron Made. One map from quick play, one standard size and one large.

boardgame: Iron Made: Rich Land map pack
description: Pack of 3 new maps: quick play, standard and large size with a new mechanic. Now on every map there are new kind of regions with resources laying there already. It means it is easier to get more resources from the stars of the game. More resources means more flexibility, and more high level buildings during the game. Compatible with all versions of Iron Made.

Iron Made Family allows not only to play with younger players, but also to get into the game more easily with more streamlined mechanics. The production chain is shorter in this version - contains only 3 buildings instead of 4, also managing the cost to build buildings is much easier since there is only one resource there. Iron Made Family contains one standard map - same as the in the Iron Made base game. Iron Made Family is compatible with all maps for all versions of Iron Made.
family: Versions & Editions: Junior Versions of Grown-Up Games

description:
Biohazard Zone is an expansion for Evil lab with a new game sheet and some new rules. There are some toxic fields in your monster mixer. Your mutation strings can not go through them. Toxin in Monster Mixer blocks spaces in Monster Mixer. That means that you will place fewer Molecules in the game and you may be forced to place them in less suitable places, because of blockade.

—description from the publisher

Bio Split is an expansion for Evil Lab with a new game sheet. It contains Bio-Splitters in some places of Monster Mixer. Bio-Splitters work as some kind of divider and create a barrier between adjacent Molecules. Molecules divided by such barrier cannot create a mutation string. That means you may create two or more Mutation Strings even when there are molecules of the same color next to each other that are divided by Bio-Splitters.

—description from the publisher

Color Rampage is an expansion for Evil Lab with a new game sheet. On Monster Mixer there are some colored irregular circles, each having different colors, that are called Cells. When putting any shape into Monster Mixer, you need to see if a space you want to put a Molecule into has a matching color with its Cell.

Tetra Terror is an expansion for Evil Lab with a new game sheet. To score points, Molecules in a Monster Mixer you must create Mutation Strings in the shape of Tetrominoes instead of those from base game. Points for bonuses and rules are adjusted to fit with new shapes.

Monstrous Monster Mixer is an expansion for Evil lab with a new game sheet. Rules for the game are the same, but this time the monster mixer is not in a square shape. It is prepared for more advanced players since it will be harder to manage to put matching is shape of mutations strings in it.

My Little Evil Lab is a standalone version of Evil Lab, with the same rules but it is much easier to manage for less experienced players. Here you have more shapes of the molecules. Since you can’t have the same shape molecules near each other the more shapes the easier it is to play.

My Little Evil Lab - Become the Evil Genius! You are a loyal minion of the infamous Dr. Evilstein, who wants to create the ultimate army of monsters. His creation of Monstrous Jelly Molecules enables the creation of terrifying mutations. You will roll and write on your lab sheet to design the DNA of the most dreadful monster possible using Monstrous Jelly Molecules. But be careful, your rivals are also working on their own experiments. Will you be able to impress your master and become the evilest scientist in this thrilling and fun board game?

More maps means more variability between plays, and more regions of the world to play on. This expansion contains three new maps: Japan, Switzerland and Austria-Hungary. The last one is prepared to play with larger group of players, so now the game will be suitable for 4-6 players.

Railroad revolution has visited Great Britain. This expansion adds three more maps to Dice of Steam. Now you can lay your tracks in Ireland, in South England and in Northern England. Fate of six railroad companies is in your hands. Good luck!

Railroad revolution has visited Old World. This expansion adds three more maps to Dice of Steam. Now you can lay your tracks in Germany, in France and in Spain. Fate of six railroad companies is in your hands. Good luck!

Railroad revolution has visited United States. This expansion adds three more maps to Dice of Steam. Now you can lay your tracks on the East Coast, on the West Coast and in Texas. Fate of six railroad companies is in your hands. Good luck!

Get ready for your thrilling adventure. A team of experts in various fields with zoologist, cartographer, archeologist among them joined you on a journey to uncharted territory. The expedition will discover new species, unknown plants, lost tribes, temples and much more. Specialists have varying research objectives. To maximize their success, finding diverse discoveries from their fields is crucial. Will you be the most skilled guide, tactically leading the experts through the uncharted territory?

Explorers is one game from the Dicey Roads series, which consists of 3 unique games with different themes and mechanics. Building the roads is the main focus point in each of those games, but thanks to other aspects each of them feels really unique.

The king gave you land between existing provinces. Your task is to designate roads connecting the outlying provinces to your advantage. Build roads with production buildings like windmills, sawmills, mines and quarries, and transfer their output to castles. You can build defense towers and villages, all of which will earn you points in different fashion. Can you become the best lord in your kingdom?

Kingdoms is one game from the Dicey Roads series, which consists of 3 unique games with different themes and mechanics. Building the roads is the main focus point in each of those games, but thanks to other aspects each of them feels really unique.

Imagine yourself as a railroad rail designer. Build railroads to deliver goods from factories to cities. Use various tracks to create tricky connections between multiple sources and destinations. Factories that your trains pass through will supply you with various goods. Delivering the correct pair of goods to cities earns valuable points. Are you ready to showcase your skills and become the best railroad designer in the game?

Railways is one game from the Dicey Roads series, which consists of 3 unique games with different themes and mechanics. Building the roads is the main focus point in each of those games, but thanks to other aspects each of them feels really unique.

An expansion for Dicey Roads: Explorers which allow you to play in cooperation with your friend. You are taking the rounds by turns communicating and making a plan for the next moves. You play alternately, each of you has only a limited range of options, so you have to work together to reach a shared goal and achieve the highest possible score.

An expansion for Dicey Roads: Kingdoms which allow you to play in cooperation with your friend. You are taking the rounds by turns communicating and making a plan for the next moves. You play alternately, each of you has only a limited range of options, so you have to work together to reach a shared goal and achieve the highest possible score.

An expansion for Dicey Roads: Railways which allow you to play in cooperation with your friend. You are taking the rounds by turns communicating and making a plan for the next moves. You play alternately, each of you has only a limited range of options, so you have to work together to reach a shared goal and achieve the highest possible score.

Astronaugthies – Dice to the Moon

				
				
					OverviewA chaotic space race full of dice, crew upgrades, and unexpected twists.

In Astronaugthies: Dice to the Moon, you roll your way through the galaxy with one goal: be the first to reach the moon by throwing a total of 26. Each turn you roll dice to gain height and draw cards: some helpful, some disastrous, and sometimes even a ticket to the mini-games.

The more Astronaugthies you collect, the more dice you roll, but the more unpredictable your journey becomes. Each player can hold up to four Action cards, four Upgrade cards, and four Crew cards. Choosing what to keep and what to discard is key: it’s how you craft your rocket. Do you focus on control, raw power, or reroll flexibility? Your upgrade strategy will make or break your mission.

Upgrade your ship, recruit a crew of mischievous Astronaugthies, and encounter absurd cosmic nonsense like flying monkeys, floating washing machines, and reverse gravity zones. The first player to roll a total of 26 wins, but nothing in space goes according to plan.

				
				
					Mini-GamesMini-games break the rules entirely. You might find yourself in a duel, trying to knock over your opponent’s dice tower, or racing to complete a dice pattern before someone else. These side challenges keep every game fresh and full of surprises.

				
				
					Key Mechanics
     Roll dice to move forward; your dice total determines which deck you draw from  
     Collect Astronaugthies to roll more dice each turn  
     Manage your Action and Upgrade cards carefully: you can only hold four of each type  
     Penalty and Space Event cards trigger immediately when drawn and cannot be stored  
     Unique event cards often affect multiple players, introducing unpredictable twists  
     Mini-games throw players into wild side-battles for crew members and other rewards  


				
				
					Gameplay Facts
     2–6 players | Ages 7+ | 30 minutes  
     Easy to teach, quick to set up, endlessly replayable  
     Every game is different thanks to variable cards and event-driven chaos  


				
				
					Components
     113 game cards (including Crew, Action, Upgrade, and Event cards)
